title: Social Media & Digital Growth Manager (B2B HORECA & Hospitality)
description:
**Job Opportunity: Social Media \& Digital Growth Manager (B2B HORECA \& Hospitality)**

**Company:** SYINRO (A Brand of Symetrix Innovation)

**Location:** \[Thane / Amane / Mumbai], Maharashtra

**Work Mode:** Hybrid (Must be willing to visit the Amane/Thane facility 2\-3 times a week to shoot content)

**Experience:** 1–3 Years in Social Media Management, Content Creation, or Digital Marketing

**Compensation:** Competitive Salary \+ Performance Bonus

**About SYINRO**

SYINRO is a fast\-growing robotics brand under Symetrix Innovation. We don't just build machines; we build the future of hospitality. Our **Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs)** are designed to serve guests in 5\-star hotels, deliver food, and manage facility hygiene.

We are making a bold strategic pivot: **We are skipping traditional trade shows to build a digital empire.** We need a storyteller who can make our robots the most talked\-about technology on LinkedIn and Instagram.

**Role Overview**

This is **not** a "sit at a desk and post Canva templates" job.

We need a **Content Creator \+ Growth Hacker**. You will be the voice and lens of SYINRO. You will document our "Behind the Scenes" journey, film our robots in action during test pilots, and position our brand as the \#1 choice for Luxury Hotels.

**Your Goal:** Turn "Views" into "Inbound Leads" from Hotel General Managers and Directors.

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\. High\-Voltage Content Creation (Video First)**

* **Shoot \& Edit:** Visit our facility/client sites to film high\-quality Reels, Shorts, and long\-form videos.
* **Themes:** "Robot vs Human challenges," "Behind the Scenes of Manufacturing," "A Day in the Life of a Robot," and "Founder Vlogs."
* **Tools:** Mastery of mobile editing (CapCut, VN) or desktop tools (Premiere Pro/DaVinci) is essential.

**2\. LinkedIn B2B Authority Building**

* Manage the personal brand of the Founder (**Ameet Agarwal**) and the company page.
* Write compelling, data\-driven posts targeting Hotel Owners, GMs, and Industry Leaders.
* Move beyond "fluff" posts—create content that educates the market on *Why Automation \= Profit*.

**3\. Digital Lead Generation (The "Growth" Part)**

* Actively engage with potential clients on LinkedIn (commenting on GM’s posts, connecting with decision\-makers).
* Monitor DMs and comments to identify hot leads and pass them to the Inside Sales team immediately.
* "Warm up" cold leads by tagging them in relevant success stories.

**4\. Visual Identity \& Sales Support**

* Design professional sales assets: PDF Brochures, Case Study Decks, and Comparison Sheets (Canva/Photoshop/Illustrator).
* Ensure every piece of content looks premium—we are selling to 5\-star hotels, so our brand must look 5\-star.

**Who We Are Looking For**

* **The Storyteller:** You can look at a piece of metal moving and turn it into a story about "The Future of Service."
* **The Hustler:** You don’t wait for content to be given to you. You grab your camera, go to the factory floor, interrupt the engineers, and *capture* the moment.
* **The B2B Mindset:** You understand that a viral video of a dancing cat is useless to us. We need content that makes a Hotel GM stop scrolling and book a demo.
* **Tech Stack:** Proficient in Instagram Reels, LinkedIn Algorithms, Canva, and Video Editing Software.
* **Location:** You must be based in or near **Thane/Kalyan/Bhiwandi** to facilitate easy travel to the HQ for shoots.

**Portfolio Requirement**

**Applications without a portfolio (links to Instagram/LinkedIn/YouTube work) will NOT be considered.** We want to see what you have *created*, not just where you have worked.

**How to Apply**

Send your CV and **Portfolio Links** to **\[Insert Email ID]**.

**Mandatory Screening Challenge (The "Ticket to Entry"):**

*Along with your CV, you must include a link to this specific task:*

"Create a 15\-second Video Concept (using stock footage or text overlays) that explains why a 5\-Star Hotel needs a Robot Waiter. Show us you can sell a concept quickly.

Job Types: Full\-time, Part\-time, Permanent, Internship, Freelance  
Contract length: 06 months

Pay: ₹14,000\.00 \- ₹20,000\.00 per month

Expected hours: 60 per week

Work Location: In person

title: Inside Sales Manager (B2B HORECA & Hospitality)
description:
**Job Opportunity: Inside Sales Manager (B2B HORECA \& Automation)**

**Company:** SYINRO (A Brand of Symetrix Innovation)

**Location:** Bhiwandi / Thane], Maharashtra

**Work Mode:** On\-site / Hybrid (As per company policy)

**Experience:** 2–5 Years in B2B Sales, Lead Generation, or Hospitality Sales

**Compensation:** Competitive Salary \+ High Performance\-Based Incentives

**About SYINRO**

SYINRO is a cutting\-edge robotics brand under Symetrix Innovation, specializing in **Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs)**. We are revolutionizing the Indian hospitality and manufacturing sectors with AI\-driven service robots designed for room service, housekeeping, and material handling. We are currently entering a strategic **"Pilot Phase"** and are looking for a relentless sales professional to lead our outreach.

**Role Overview**

We are looking for a hungry, high\-energy **Inside Sales Manager** who loves the thrill of the chase. You will not just be "making calls"—you will be the engine behind our market entry.

Your primary mission is to break through to decision\-makers at **4\-Star and 5\-Star Hotels (HORECA)** and secure face\-to\-face meetings for our Founder to demonstrate our robots. You must be comfortable hearing "no" ten times to get one "yes."

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\. Market Research \& Database Building**

* Build and maintain a high\-quality database of **500\+ Top\-Tier HORECA clients** (Hotels, Resorts, Premium Cafés) in Maharashtra and key metros.
* Identify the right **Decision Makers**: General Managers (GMs), Directors of Operations, Chief Engineers, and Procurement Heads.
* Use LinkedIn Sales Navigator, online directories, and industry associations to keep the database fresh and accurate.

**2\. Cold Outreach \& Lead Generation**

* Execute a high volume of outreach daily: **40\+ Cold Calls** and **30\+ Personalized Emails**.
* Pitch our exclusive **"Robotics Pilot Program"** to luxury properties, focusing on operational efficiency, labor saving, and the "wow factor" for guests.
* Bypass gatekeepers (receptionists/assistants) effectively to reach the C\-Suite.

**3\. Appointment Setting (Core KPI)**

* The single most important metric for this role is **Confirmed Meetings Booked**.
* Schedule site visits and demos for the Founder with qualified prospects.
* Coordinate calendars and send meeting invites/confirmations to ensure low cancellation rates.

**4\. Pipeline Management**

* Maintain a strict **Daily Activity Log** (Calls made, emails sent, meetings booked).
* Follow up relentlessly with warm leads who requested brochures or asked for time.
* Nurture relationships via WhatsApp and email until the meeting is secured.

**Who We Are Looking For**

* **Experience:** Minimum 2 years in B2B Inside Sales, Tele\-sales, or Business Development. *Experience selling to Hotels/Hospitality is a massive plus.*
* **Communication:** Exceptional verbal and written English. You must sound professional, confident, and polished enough to speak with a General Manager of a Taj or Marriott property.
* **Grit:** You have thick skin. You view a "hanging up" not as a failure, but as a step closer to the next "yes."
* **Tech\-Savvy:** Proficient in using CRM tools (HubSpot/Zoho/Excel), LinkedIn, and Google Workspace.
* **Location:** Living in or near Thane/Bhiwandi/Kalyan is preferred for ease of commute.

**Why Join SYINRO?**

* **Sell the Future:** You aren't selling insurance or credit cards; you are selling **Autonomous Robots**. It’s a cool, high\-interest product.
* **Direct Access:** Work directly with the Founder and core engineering team.
* **High Growth:** We are a fast\-moving startup. Perform well, and you will build and lead your own sales team within a year.

**How to Apply**

Send your CV to **\[Insert Email ID]** with the subject line: **"Inside Sales \- \[Your Name]"**.

**Mandatory Screening Question:**

*In your email, answer this in 3 sentences:*

*"Imagine you are calling the General Manager of the JW Marriott. The receptionist says he is busy. What do you say to get her to put you through or give you his direct line?"*

Job Types: Full\-time, Part\-time, Permanent, Internship  
Contract length: 06 months

Pay: ₹14,000\.00 \- ₹20,000\.00 per month

Expected hours: 60 per week

Work Location: In person

As a Senior Controller Coordinator, you will be responsible for providing consistent superior cost accounting support services and reporting to stakeholders. You will be responsible for Product cost estimate (PCE) reporting and analysis, Product Costing, reporting, analyzing, Inventory reconciliation.
Responsibilities:* Month End Closing – Generate and review reports for Cost Accountants using Diamond Systems Reporting, SAP, MS Access and MS Excel.

**Job Description: Sales Engineer – Automation**

**Position Overview**

The Sales Engineer – Automation is responsible for driving business growth by providing technical expertise, developing automation solutions, and managing customer relationships. This role bridges engineering and sales, ensuring clients receive the right automation technologies to optimize productivity, efficiency, and operational reliability.

**Compensation:** Competitive Salary \+ Performance Bonus

**About SYINRO**

SYINRO is a fast\-growing robotics brand under Symetrix Innovation. We don't just build machines; we build the future of hospitality. Our **Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs)** are designed to serve guests in 5\-star hotels, deliver food, and manage facility hygiene.

We are making a bold strategic pivot: **We are skipping traditional trade shows to build a digital empire.** We need a storyteller who can make our robots the most talked\-about technology on LinkedIn and Instagram.

**Role Overview**

This is **not** a "sit at a desk and post Canva templates" job.

We need a **Content Creator \+ Growth Hacker**. You will be the voice and lens of SYINRO. You will document our "Behind the Scenes" journey, film our robots in action during test pilots, and position our brand as the \#1 choice for Luxury Hotels.

**Your Goal:** Turn "Views" into "Inbound Leads" from Hotel General Managers and Directors.

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\. High\-Voltage Content Creation (Video First)**

* **Shoot \& Edit:** Visit our facility/client sites to film high\-quality Reels, Shorts, and long\-form videos.
* **Themes:** "Robot vs Human challenges," "Behind the Scenes of Manufacturing," "A Day in the Life of a Robot," and "Founder Vlogs."
* **Tools:** Mastery of mobile editing (CapCut, VN) or desktop tools (Premiere Pro/DaVinci) is essential.

**2\. LinkedIn B2B Authority Building**

* Manage the personal brand of the Founder (**Ameet Agarwal**) and the company page.
* Write compelling, data\-driven posts targeting Hotel Owners, GMs, and Industry Leaders.
* Move beyond "fluff" posts—create content that educates the market on *Why Automation \= Profit*.

**3\. Digital Lead Generation (The "Growth" Part)**

* Actively engage with potential clients on LinkedIn (commenting on GM’s posts, connecting with decision\-makers).
* Monitor DMs and comments to identify hot leads and pass them to the Inside Sales team immediately.
* "Warm up" cold leads by tagging them in relevant success stories.

**4\. Visual Identity \& Sales Support**

* Design professional sales assets: PDF Brochures, Case Study Decks, and Comparison Sheets (Canva/Photoshop/Illustrator).
* Ensure every piece of content looks premium—we are selling to 5\-star hotels, so our brand must look 5\-star.

**Who We Are Looking For**

* **The Storyteller:** You can look at a piece of metal moving and turn it into a story about "The Future of Service."
* **The Hustler:** You don’t wait for content to be given to you. You grab your camera, go to the factory floor, interrupt the engineers, and *capture* the moment.
* **The B2B Mindset:** You understand that a viral video of a dancing cat is useless to us. We need content that makes a Hotel GM stop scrolling and book a demo.
* **Tech Stack:** Proficient in Instagram Reels, LinkedIn Algorithms, Canva, and Video Editing Software.
* **Location:** You must be based in or near **Thane/Kalyan/Bhiwandi** to facilitate easy travel to the HQ for shoots.

**Portfolio Requirement**

**Applications without a portfolio (links to Instagram/LinkedIn/YouTube work) will NOT be considered.** We want to see what you have *created*, not just where you have worked.

**How to Apply**

Send your CV and **Portfolio Links** to **\[Insert Email ID]**.

**Mandatory Screening Challenge (The "Ticket to Entry"):**

*Along with your CV, you must include a link to this specific task:*

"Create a 15\-second Video Concept (using stock footage or text overlays) that explains why a 5\-Star Hotel needs a Robot Waiter. Show us you can sell a concept quickly.

Job Types: Full\-time, Part\-time, Permanent, Internship, Freelance  
Contract length: 06 months

Pay: ₹14,000\.00 \- ₹20,000\.00 per month

Expected hours: 60 per week

Work Location: In person

title: Inside Sales Manager (B2B HORECA & Hospitality)
description:
**Job Opportunity: Inside Sales Manager (B2B HORECA \& Automation)**

**Company:** SYINRO (A Brand of Symetrix Innovation)

**Location:** Bhiwandi / Thane], Maharashtra

**Work Mode:** On\-site / Hybrid (As per company policy)

**Experience:** 2–5 Years in B2B Sales, Lead Generation, or Hospitality Sales

**Compensation:** Competitive Salary \+ High Performance\-Based Incentives

**About SYINRO**

SYINRO is a cutting\-edge robotics brand under Symetrix Innovation, specializing in **Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs)**. We are revolutionizing the Indian hospitality and manufacturing sectors with AI\-driven service robots designed for room service, housekeeping, and material handling. We are currently entering a strategic **"Pilot Phase"** and are looking for a relentless sales professional to lead our outreach.

**Role Overview**

We are looking for a hungry, high\-energy **Inside Sales Manager** who loves the thrill of the chase. You will not just be "making calls"—you will be the engine behind our market entry.

Your primary mission is to break through to decision\-makers at **4\-Star and 5\-Star Hotels (HORECA)** and secure face\-to\-face meetings for our Founder to demonstrate our robots. You must be comfortable hearing "no" ten times to get one "yes."

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\. Market Research \& Database Building**

* Build and maintain a high\-quality database of **500\+ Top\-Tier HORECA clients** (Hotels, Resorts, Premium Cafés) in Maharashtra and key metros.
* Identify the right **Decision Makers**: General Managers (GMs), Directors of Operations, Chief Engineers, and Procurement Heads.
* Use LinkedIn Sales Navigator, online directories, and industry associations to keep the database fresh and accurate.

**2\. Cold Outreach \& Lead Generation**

* Execute a high volume of outreach daily: **40\+ Cold Calls** and **30\+ Personalized Emails**.
* Pitch our exclusive **"Robotics Pilot Program"** to luxury properties, focusing on operational efficiency, labor saving, and the "wow factor" for guests.
* Bypass gatekeepers (receptionists/assistants) effectively to reach the C\-Suite.

**3\. Appointment Setting (Core KPI)**

* The single most important metric for this role is **Confirmed Meetings Booked**.
* Schedule site visits and demos for the Founder with qualified prospects.
* Coordinate calendars and send meeting invites/confirmations to ensure low cancellation rates.

**4\. Pipeline Management**

* Maintain a strict **Daily Activity Log** (Calls made, emails sent, meetings booked).
* Follow up relentlessly with warm leads who requested brochures or asked for time.
* Nurture relationships via WhatsApp and email until the meeting is secured.

**Who We Are Looking For**

* **Experience:** Minimum 2 years in B2B Inside Sales, Tele\-sales, or Business Development. *Experience selling to Hotels/Hospitality is a massive plus.*
* **Communication:** Exceptional verbal and written English. You must sound professional, confident, and polished enough to speak with a General Manager of a Taj or Marriott property.
* **Grit:** You have thick skin. You view a "hanging up" not as a failure, but as a step closer to the next "yes."
* **Tech\-Savvy:** Proficient in using CRM tools (HubSpot/Zoho/Excel), LinkedIn, and Google Workspace.
* **Location:** Living in or near Thane/Bhiwandi/Kalyan is preferred for ease of commute.

**Why Join SYINRO?**

* **Sell the Future:** You aren't selling insurance or credit cards; you are selling **Autonomous Robots**. It’s a cool, high\-interest product.
* **Direct Access:** Work directly with the Founder and core engineering team.
* **High Growth:** We are a fast\-moving startup. Perform well, and you will build and lead your own sales team within a year.

**How to Apply**

Send your CV to **\[Insert Email ID]** with the subject line: **"Inside Sales \- \[Your Name]"**.

**Mandatory Screening Question:**

*In your email, answer this in 3 sentences:*

*"Imagine you are calling the General Manager of the JW Marriott. The receptionist says he is busy. What do you say to get her to put you through or give you his direct line?"*

title: Associate, ML Data Operations, GO-AI Operations
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


This team enables automation at Amazon Robotics Fulfillment centers. This team serves Amazon Internal Fulfillment Technologies \& Robotics teams by enabling automation, which includes real\-time \& offline (image/video) data auditing services. One of the key contributions of this team is supporting the fulfillment centers in maintaining inventory accuracy.  

  

An Associate in this role is required to watch the video of the stowing action at a fulfillment center, understand it thoroughly and make best use of human judgement in combination with the tools and resources to indicate the activity captured in the video. They are expected to verify or mark the location of product through a tool while maintaining highest level of accuracy. This process helps in maintaining the fulfillment center's stow quality. This is an operational role. Under general supervision, the Associate performs precise and thorough video/image audits with high degree of accuracy and speed, thus aiding defect reduction.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

The Associate has to watch several hundred videos in a shift and provide responses by following goals on accuracy (quality), speed (productivity) and right / acceptable practices. Associates are required to take breaks at the pre\-defined slots and ensure 6\.8 to 7 hours’ time per day is spent to answer the videos. Associates who are hired to work from home should maintain (1\) dedicated workspace i.e., table, chair \& sufficient lighting (2\) workspace / work related data shouldn’t be accessed by anyone other than employee  

  

The candidate is expected to demonstrate:  

* Willingness to work in Non\-tech role for contract duration of 6 months
* Ability to audit image/video/text based Jobs
* Ability to identify details from blurry, less sharp videos and provide correct response. Requires high level of attention \& focus on screen
* Willingness to work on incremental targets/goals on quality \& productivity
* Fast Pace of implementation \& consistent performance
* Ability to work in rotational shifts (including night shifts), remote teams and exceptionally good team player
* Readiness to come to office for few days (when required, applicable for associates working from home)
* Willing to switch ON laptop camera while on virtual meetings.

  

A day in the life  

Associates work in 24x7 environment with rotational shifts. Associates would be working in a 9 hour shift, including pre\-scheduled breaks. The shift timings would be subject to change every 3\-4 months or as per business requirement. In case associate is working in night shift, night shift allowance will be provided as per applicable Amazon’s work policy.  

  

Weekly Offs: Rotational two\-consecutive day off (it is a 5\-day working week with 2 consecutive days off, not necessarily Saturday and Sunday) or as per business discretion.  

  

About the team  

Data Auditing Operations team provides human support to Amazon Fulfillment facilities with goal of enabling hands\-free active stowing through visual audits on videos/images. Videos with brief duration (typically between 15 and 20seconds) are sent to Operations Team for humans to audit them with information on products being stored at fulfilment centers. For business use, these videos must be thoroughly reviewed and audited using best human judgement. The effectiveness of automated process will be increased by using videos that Associates have audited. This process helps maintaining stow quality at fulfillment center and Associate will be further evaluated for performance improvements/coaching.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Work a flexible schedule/shift/work area, including weekends, nights, and/or holidays

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Data Analyst
description:
"Please note that the Job will close at 12am on Posting Close date, so please submit your application prior to the Close Date"  

  

Design and implement processes and solutions associated with a wide variety of data sets used for data/text mining, analysis to support informed business decisions. Gain insight into key business and deliverables by examining structured and unstructured data from multiple disparate sources. Effectively use current and emerging technologies to evaluate trends and develop actionable insights and recommendations to management, via the information available for analysis. Learn to use data, statistical and quantitative analysis, to drive decision making.

  

Acts as a technical expert on complex and specialist subject(s). Supports management with the analysis, interpretation and application of complex information, contributing to the achievement of divisional and corporate goals. Supports or leads projects by applying area of expertise.

  

Analytical Skills, Accuracy \& Attention to Detail, Planning \& Organizing Skills, Influencing \& Persuasion Skills, Presentation Skills

  

FedEx was built on a philosophy that puts people first, one we take seriously. We are an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer and we are committed to a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workforce in which we enforce fair treatment, and provide growth opportunities for everyone.


All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of age, race, color, national origin, genetics, religion, gender, marital status, pregnancy (including childbirth or a related medical condition), physical or mental disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances.

**Our Company**
---------------


FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.

**Our Philosophy**
------------------


The People\-Service\-Profit philosophy (P\-S\-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy, or activity. FedEx takes care of our people; they, in turn, deliver the impeccable service demanded by our customers, who reward us with the profitability necessary to secure our future. The essential element in making the People\-Service\-Profit philosophy such a positive force for the company is where we close the circle, and return these profits back into the business, and invest back in our people. Our success in the industry is attributed to our people. Through our P\-S\-P philosophy, we have a work environment that encourages team members to be innovative in delivering the highest possible quality of service to our customers. We care for their well\-being, and value their contributions to the company.

**Our Culture**
---------------


Our culture is important for many reasons, and we intentionally bring it to life through our behaviors, actions, and activities in every part of the world. The FedEx culture and values have been a cornerstone of our success and growth since we began in the early 1970’s. While other companies can copy our systems, infrastructure, and processes, our culture makes us unique and is often a differentiating factor as we compete and grow in today’s global marketplace.

title: Data Analyst - Mumbai (7+ Years)
description:
About this role: We are seeking a highly skilled Data Analyst for Digital Marketing to join our dynamic  

team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for collecting, analyzing, and interpreting data to help us  

make informed marketing decisions. You will work closely with the marketing team to measure  

campaign performance, identify trends, and provide actionable insights that drive our digital marketing  

strategies.  

Responsibilities:  

* Collect, validate, and consolidate data from multiple business systems and maintain clean data


structures and definitions  

* Build and maintain automated dashboards and reports in Power BI /Tableau
* Track key KPIs across functions (performance, productivity, cost, quality, SLAs, customer


outcomes); highlight trends, risks, and improvement opportunities  

* Use Python (pandas, automation) for data cleaning, transformation, merging multiple sources,


and creating repeatable analysis pipelines  

* Perform deep\-dive analysis to identify root causes, bottlenecks, and drivers of performance;


convert insights into actionable recommendations  

* Support experimentation and optimization (A/B testing, process improvements, parameter


tuning) and measure impact  

* Build basic predictive models/forecasting where needed (demand, workload, churn risk,


outcome likelihood) to support planning and decision\-making  

* Ensure data accuracy, integrity, documentation (metric definitions, data lineage, SOPs), and


compliance with privacy/security best practices  

* Experience with digital marketing platforms and analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics,


Facebook Insights, HubSpot).  

Qualifications:  

* Bachelor’s degree in data science, Statistics, Marketing, or a related field with 7\+Yrs of


experience

title: Senior Business Analyst
description:
**Senior Business Analyst**
===========================

Date: 11 Feb 2026
Location: Andheri (Mumbai)
Company: Fleet Management India Private Limited
**About Fleet Management**

  



Our 30\-year journey rides on the passion of over 27,000 seafarers and 1,000 onshore professionals. Today, we are one of the largest independent third\-party ship management companies managing over 650\+ diverse types of vessels.

  



Headquartered in Hong Kong SAR, China, we operate on a global scale having 27 offices in 12 countries. Our client base spans over 100 world\-class ship owners, including Fortune 500 companies from China, Greece, India, Japan, Korea, Netherlands, Norway, Turkey and the USA, among others.

  



In a shore career at Fleet, you will be working with a team of a highly passionate, self\-driven and committed group of people. We aim to be a place where you can achieve your full potential, regardless of your background.

  



We are looking for individuals who are ambitious about making a strong contribution to Fleet's short and long\-term sustainable growth – whether you are dealing directly with clients or working in a role supporting the business, such as technology, legal or communications.

  



As a Senior Business Analyst in our Digital/IT team, you’ll be a key resource guiding our PARIS ecosystem to new heights. This isn’t just about mapping requirements—it’s about defining and delivering transformative solutions that power 600\+ ships and 27,000 seafarers worldwide. You’ll bridge the language of data and strategy, turning stakeholder visions into actionable roadmaps that propel our ecosystem from concept to cutting\-edge reality.

  



Your mission? To orchestrate the integration of technology and maritime excellence, ensuring our digital solutions aren’t just robust but guide smarter decisions across a more connected fleet. If you’re driven by turning complexity into clarity and thrive in taking ownership of high\-impact projects, join us to navigate the future of maritime digitalisation together.

  


**Key Roles and Responsibilities**

  



As a Senior Business Analyst, your typical day might include:

  


**1\.Strategic Navigator: Define Product Requirements and Vision**

  


**Pioneer solutions \-** Develop clear user stories and requirements that align with our PARIS product vision, ensuring every feature addresses genuine user needs

  


**Decode stakeholder needs** \- Transform vague or unclear demands into clear functional AND non\-functional requirements using critical thinking, distinguishing between desired features and mission\-critical objectives

  


**Shape the future \-** Partner with Product Owners and the CX team to evolve the product roadmap, balancing ambition with feasibility whilst challenging assumptions to ensure long\-term strategic value

  


**Identify risks and opportunities \-** Proactively surface risks, gaps, and opportunities to ensure roadmaps remain on track and ensure successful delivery

  


**2\. Problem\-Solver: Turn Data into Decisive Action**

  


**Prioritisation:** Manage multiple product roadmaps with discipline, prioritising based on business value and impact

  


**Unlock insights:** Analyse user feedback and UX analytics to understand what is working, what is not, and why. Translate findings into actionable strategies that improve product performance

  


**Mentor the next generation \-** Guide other Business Analysts with your expertise, fostering excellence through clear thinking, rapid iteration, and effective collaboration

  


**3\. Collaborative Architect: Build Bridges Between Vision and Reality**

  


**Lead cross\-functional partnerships –** Coordinate across IT, operations teams and external stakeholders to understand requirements, negotiate priorities, and ensure solutions support Fleet’s objectives

  


**Drive change adoption** \- Design and execute rollout strategies for new products and capabilities, ensuring smooth adoption through training, communication, and stakeholder engagement because impact only matters when solutions are embraced

  

**4\. Continuous Improvement: Elevating Quality Through Learning \& Innovation**

  


**Drive continuous improvement** \- Identify and highlight opportunities for process improvement that benefit individual contribution and broader team effectiveness

  


**Stay current \-** Maintain knowledge of industry best practices, tools and methodologies to enhance capability and delivery quality

  


**Embody excellence \-** Model collaborative, learning\-focused values aligned with team standards and Fleet Management's commitment to operational excellence

  


**Internal:**

  



Operational Product Owners \& other stakeholders (Based in HK, India, Singapore, Cyprus, Philippines, China)

  



Customer Experience (CX) team including Product Team, UX Designers and QA Engineers (based in HK \& India)

  


**Job Experience, Functional Knowledge and Qualifications**

  




Indicate the minimum and preferred education and experience for this job and any licenses and certifications required.

  


**ESSENTIAL**

  


**You must have all these skills and experiences**

  



5\+ years of experience working in a Business Analysis or Senior Business Analysis role in developing repeatable, scalable IT products

  



Effective and confident communication in written and spoken English – getting messages across clearly and concisely

  



Strong mindset on understanding the use of data to help drive prioritisation \- demonstrated through the use of either:  

Advanced Excel skills, or

  



Use of database skills such as SQL and Elasticsearch or Google Analytics for UX analytics

  



Lead change management initiatives across a large department / company to land new capability smoothly and effectively

  



Demonstration of influencing senior stakeholders (Director level including C\-Level)

  



Evidence of mentoring other Business Analysts to help them grow and reach their potential

  



Applied experience in AI prompting for research, use case discovery, requirements gathering, and data analysis

  

**DESIRABLE –**

  



It’s great if you have these too

  

Proficiency with JIRA (sprint planning, backlog refinement), Figma (design collaboration and feedback), and cross\-tool workflow coordination. Comfortable managing design\-to\-delivery handoffs

  



Demonstrated experience in Agile/Scrum environments, with the flexibility to adapt across Waterfall or Hybrid methodologies depending on project context

  



Qualification in process mapping (such as Lean Six Sigma)

  



Maritime / Shipping industry experience would be a huge plus or similar industries such as Aviation, Logistics, or Transport

  


**Competencies**

  




Indicate the observable behaviors that demonstrate the knowledge, skills and abilities that the employee should have at a particular level.

  


**Analysis and Problem Solving (Level 3\):** Uses a systematic approach to root cause analysis on complex problems to identify underlying trends and put forward well\-thought\-out solutions to address the causes and reduce risk.

  


**Listening and Communicating (Level 3\):** Is effective in communicating his vision with a wider audience. A good communicator knows when to use which channel, and which tone of voice in order to drive maximum impact.

  


**Collaboration, Inclusion \& Teamwork (Level 2\):** A good team player that is personable, friendly, polite and takes the time to know people. Helps new colleagues and visitors feel welcome. Mentors and encourages junior members.

  




**Customer Focus (Level 3\):** Proactive in maintaining relationships and managing customer expectations effectively. Takes a partnership approach to solve problems and improve service standards using data to define continuous improvement.

  


**Planning \& Organising (Level 2\):** Uses the supplied tools for structured planning for optimal time use. Balances competing priorities. Promptly updates people when plans change and keep updated on progress. Adjusts own plans based on FML strategies and plans.

  


**Initiative (Level 3\):** Always looks for opportunities to improve efficiency and effectiveness in their own and other peoples work backed by clear rationale and benefits to the business. Role models desired change behaviour and uses external best practice as reference.

  


**Accountability (Level 2\):** Responsible for delivering own work without unnecessary supervision. Always demonstrates integrity and ethical behaviour being a role model for others. Invites constructive feedback adjusting actions accordingly. Thinks through mistakes made and finds ways to prevent reoccurrence.

  


**Resilience and managing wellbeing (Level 1\):** Is willing to take on additional unplanned urgent tasks when required without sacrificing performance standards. Knows how to priories and break down tasks, and when to escalate to his managed to manage pressure.

  


**Adaptability (Level 2\):** Seeks to understand the rationale for changes at Fleet looking for different perspectives to facilitate and positively contribute to the initiatives within the team and themselves.

  



Fleet Management Limited is committed to diversity, equity and inclusion in the workplace. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, sex, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, genetic information, pregnancy, or any other protected characteristic as outlined by local laws.

description:
We're seeking someone to join our team as a Data Lifecycle Management ('DLM') specialist in the Data Governance \& AI Non\-Financial Risk team to review new or changing applications, and ensure record retention, disposition, and archiving requirements are met.
  

  

In the Legal \& Compliance division, we assist the Firm in achieving its business objectives by facilitating and overseeing the Firm's management of legal, regulatory and franchise risk. This is an Associate level position within the Information Management team which is responsible for ensuring that business teams are informed about risks and required controls relating to data location, localization, transfer and use, to assist with compliance with applicable policies, regulations, and business requirements.
  

  

Since 1935, Morgan Stanley is known as a global leader in financial services, always evolving and innovating to better serve our clients and our communities in more than 40 countries around the world.  

  

  

  

What you'll do in the role:
  

  

\> Assess data and records retention, archiving, and disposition requirements of systems across all business divisions within the firm.
  

\> Conduct reviews and analysis, including regular meetings with business and technology teams, and manage inbound questions from various business teams.
  

\> Support the identification of risks relating to data management, including retention, disposition, location, and transfer. Work with business, technology and compliance teams to ensure appropriate action plans are in place to mitigate these risks.
  

\> Document accurate and concise data management requirements.
  

\> Support stakeholders in identifying data risk management and operational controls.
  

\> Coordinate and collect information, compile analysis reports and track implementation of recommendations to completion.
  

\> Engage system and business owners in data management activities and aid in problem solving and decision making.
  

\> Represent the DLM team and communicate Information Management policy requirements in cross functional meetings.
  

\> Prepare team progress reports for manager by summarizing activities and trends.
  

\> Develop process improvements and foster business and technical solutions with relevant team members. What you'll bring to the role:?
  

  

\> Strong industry experience related to information or data management, data storage, data migrations, financial services, or similarly regulated industry.
  

\> Experience in business analysis, or in a Financial services operational role.
  

\> Excellent communication skills (verbal and written English).
  

\> High level of attention to detail and ability to document, synthesize, and communicate complex material in a succinct and concise way.
  

\> Strong organizational skills and ability to ensure that specialized topics are correctly addressed, discussed and documented.
  

\> Experience in developing business and functional requirements and applying them to technology systems.
  

\> Knowledge of personal data protection and privacy regulations desired
  

\> A strong understanding of IT systems such as database and cloud technologies, as well as emerging technologies such as AI desired.

title: Analytics & Insights Lead, Client Strategy & Business Intelligence
description:
**About ICP**


ICP is a global leader in Content Operations, partnering with some of the world's most recognizable brands, including Unilever, Diageo, Coca\-Cola, Mars, P\&G, Starbucks, Coty, L’Oréal, NBCU, and Aetna. Our expertise spans content management, logistics, creative operations, production, and digital commerce enablement, ensuring a seamless flow of content across all systems and channels. We empower brands to achieve operational excellence and confidently manage their content. Content confidently.™

  

With offices in **Atlanta, London, Mexico City, Mumbai**, and **Shanghai**, we operate on a global scale, delivering world\-class solutions that drive exceptional business outcomes.

 **Who We Are**


At ICP, our values define us: we are Curious, Focused, Creative, Trustworthy, and Inclusive.

 **We're A People First Company**


At ICP, we provide benefits that matter to our people and enable us to be engaged both in and outside of work. We foster a culture where *work/life* balance is nurtured and encouraged, offering hybrid working, generous paid time off, paid holidays, volunteer time off, and Summer half\-day Fridays. We also take care of our people with competitive medical, dental, and vision benefits, mental health support, and a robust savings plan.

 **Bring the Confidence**


Are you a relationship\-focused, driven professional with a growth mindset? Do you thrive on breaking through challenges and excelling in competitive environments? You're not expected to have all the answers, but your passion for uncovering solutions and building strong partnerships makes you the perfect fit for this role. We’d love to hear from you!

 **About the Role**


The Analytics \& Insights Lead is an integral member of the Client Strategy team. This role is dedicated to establishing frameworks for data analytics and analysis that is accurate, contextually grounded, and actionable. And to transform raw data, reports, and operational inputs into structured, meaningful insights. The insights developed will support the creation of intellectual property and business intelligence initiatives, and to articulate the significance of findings and the implications for clients.

  

As ICP shifts towards an integrated, insight\-driven partnership model, the Analytics \& Insights Lead’s contributions are essential for:

* Elevating reporting from basic outputs to compelling, insight\-driven storytelling.
* Identifying patterns and opportunities both within client environments and across the broader client base.
* Analysing client learnings to inform best practices, frameworks, and future service offerings.
* Recognizing and defining data collection needs and appropriate formats.
* Collecting, cleaning, analyzing, and interpreting complex datasets to reveal trends, patterns, and insights that inform business decisions.
* Developing reports and dashboards in collaboration with ICP Technology and Innovation team.
* Communicating findings to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders, thereby influencing strategy and performance improvements.

 **Key Responsibilities:**

**Foundational analytics architecture**

* Defining **what data should exist**
* Establishing **KPIs and benchmark frameworks**
* Shaping **how analysis is structured, repeatable, and comparable**
* Determining **collection formats, governance, and quality standards**

### **Insight translation \+ strategic interpretation**

* Move reporting from “outputs” to **insight\-led storytelling**
* Interpret patterns across **multiple clients**, not just single engagements
* Inform **best practices, IP, and future service offerings**

### **Client\-facing Influence**

* Communicates directly with Consultants, Client Partners, Delivery
* Influences **client decision\-making**
* Helps ICP articulate *why* findings matter, not just *what* they are

**Ideal Candidate Profile**

* Demonstrates strong analytical skills with the capability to organize and interpret data using statistical analysis and data modeling techniques.
* Exhibits critical thinking, effective problem\-solving abilities, and sound business acumen.
* Communicates clearly in written, verbal, and visual formats. Curious, proactive, and eager to understand both data and business context.
* Collaborative and comfortable working in cross\-functional environments.
* Skilled at crafting compelling value narratives and presenting to both internal and client stakeholders.
* Brings experience within content operations, marketing operations, or related marketing services environments, enabling them to quickly understand ICP’s client workflows, data ecosystems, and operational models.
* Understands the nuances of content supply chains, omnichannel marketing delivery, and operational performance metrics, allowing them to contextualize insights in ways that are directly meaningful to ICP and its clients.
* Demonstrates accountability, reliability, and attention to detail.
* Has experience developing benchmark frameworks.

This role will work within one or more teams across B\&I Data and the subject matter experts to design, validate, develop, and deploy both minimum viable products (MVP) as well as ready to deploy solutions.


In Citi we believe the future is here. Right here with us. Home to where we define, ideate, develop, and distribute analytical dashboard solutions of far\-reaching impact for our international business. And right now, the door is open to direct the future of our truly global organization. This means collaborating with the keenest minds in Finance / Risk / Technology / Data Science and more.


If you have this kind of vision, capable of seeing ahead, of developing a clear path forward in a quest to try the yet untried, here is the opportunity. * Work with the business and IT teams to build technical solutions, using variety of data sources and create vivid and impactful analytical dashboard.
* Design, build and enhance high\-performance, data\-intensive solutions from all the way to data acquisition, rendering, visualization, and distribution.

title: Mechatronics Engineer - Intern
description:
Are you interested in building something NEW? Do you have a passion for bringing robots to life? If you answer yes to both, then this internship is for you!

We are looking for an awesome mechatronics engineer intern to join us on our journey of building (and breaking) the next generation of robotics, which includes drones, rovers, etc

**Key Responsibilities**

* **Design \& Modeling:** Assist in developing mechanical systems, components, and layouts using CAD software (Fusion 360, SolidWorks, etc).
* **Prototyping \& Assembly:** Support hands\-on assembly, calibration, and testing of robotic arms, sensors, and actuators.
* **Troubleshooting \& Maintenance:** Run diagnostics on electro\-mechanical equipment, identifying root causes of issues in automation systems.
* **Documentation \& Reporting:** Create technical documentation, data analysis reports, and project presentations.
* **Collaboration:** Work with cross\-disciplinary teams (mechanical, electrical, software) to integrate components.

**Required Qualifications \& Skills**

* **Education:** Currently pursuing or recently completed a Bachelor’s degree in Mechatronics, Mechanical, Electrical, or Robotics Engineering.
* **Technical Skills:** Knowledge of CAD software (SolidWorks, AutoCAD), basic programming (C\+\+, Python), and circuit design.
* **Hands\-on Capability:** Experience with building or prototyping, troubleshooting electronics/mechanisms, etc
* **Soft Skills:** Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills. Ability to work independently and take a decision is critical.

title: Technology Consulting Apprenticeship
description:
**Overview** **The position is intended for candidates graduating in 2026, who have no active academic backlogs and have not held full‑time employment prior to the apprenticeship. Candidates who have previously completed an apprenticeship must maintain a mandatory gap of 365 days before starting a new apprenticeship.**


Come build community, explore your passions and do your best work at Microsoft with thousands of university interns from every corner of the world. This opportunity will allow you to bring your aspirations, talent, potential—and excitement for the journey ahead.


As a Technology Consultant Apprentice, you will establish and build data management solutions based on business and analytical requirements to integrate, govern, transform, and store data across distributed Azure cloud services, databases, and other applicable storage systems. You will leverage your understanding of Azure services, data governance principles, and analytics platforms to ensure high\-quality, secure, and reliable data pipelines and workflows. This includes working with Azure Purview for data governance, Azure Fabric for unified analytics, and Power BI for business intelligence to deliver actionable insights and cutting\-edge data solutions.


You will work on real\-world scenarios involving data management, governance, and analytics. You will utilize Azure tools such as Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Purview, Power BI, and Azure Data Lake Storage. You will also apply your knowledge to establish data governance frameworks, optimize data workflows for reporting, and design scalable architectures for analytics across structured and unstructured data. Your responsibilities include ensuring data accuracy, compliance with security standards, and building models and dashboards that empower decision\-making at scale.


As a Technology Consultant Apprentice, you will also explore and integrate AI tools like co\-pilots to enhance productivity and accelerate the delivery of high\-quality data solutions.


At Microsoft GDC (Data \& AI), Apprentices work on real\-world projects in collaboration with teams across the world, while having fun along the way. You’ll be empowered to build community, explore your passions, and achieve your goals. This is your chance to bring your solutions and ideas to life while working on cutting\-edge technology, leveraging AI tools like co\-pilots to enhance efficiency and innovation in your projects.


Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

 **Responsibilities** **Perform Data Governance and Integration**

* Implement data governance frameworks using tools like Azure Purview to ensure data consistency, compliance, and security.
* Integrate data from multiple sources, ensuring accurate and efficient data consolidation for analytics purposes.
* Work with various data formats (e.g., JSON, CSV, XML) and ensure compatibility with analytical tools.

**Design and Build Analytical Solutions**

* Develop and maintain data models and reporting solutions to support business analytics use cases.
* Create schemas and metadata for effective organization and discovery of data across storage systems.
* Apply data modeling techniques (e.g., star schema, snowflake schema) to design optimal structures for business intelligence and reporting.

**Optimize and Manage Data Workflows**

* Analyze and resolve data governance and quality issues, ensuring reliability in analytics workflows.
* Optimize data flows for reporting, including implementing caching, indexing, and partitioning strategies.
* Implement role\-based access controls (RBAC) and security measures to protect sensitive information.

**Implement and Validate Analytical Dashboards**

* Design and implement interactive dashboards using tools like Power BI to provide real\-time insights.
* Validate data accuracy in visualizations by ensuring consistency with source systems.
* Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) to uncover trends and insights for stakeholders.

**Collaborate and Communicate Insights**

* Work closely with stakeholders to understand analytical requirements and deliver actionable insights.
* Document data flows, models, and dashboard features to ensure transparency and ease of use.
* Present findings and recommendations to technical and non\-technical audiences using visual storytelling.

**Manage and Maintain Data Assets**

* Ensure the accuracy and availability of data by monitoring storage systems and analytical pipelines.
* Write, debug, and optimize SQL queries for analytics and reporting tasks.
* Create and maintain reusable datasets, reports, and templates to streamline analytical workflows.

  

**Qualifications** **Required Qualifications:**

* Pursuing a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Finance, Business, or related field
* Strong understanding of data management principles, including governance, integration, and security.
* Basic knowledge of data visualization and analytics tools such as Power BI or Tableau.

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Familiarity with data management and analytics tools like Azure Purview, Power BI, and Azure Synapse Analytics.
* Proficiency in SQL, Python, and data modeling concepts (e.g., star schema, snowflake schema).
* Exposure to handling various data formats like JSON, CSV, and XML for analytics and reporting.
* Leveraging AI tools like co\-pilots to enhance efficiency and innovation in your projects.
* Knowledge of data governance practices, including metadata management and role\-based access controls (RBAC).
* Ability to troubleshoot, optimize, and document data workflows and analytical pipelines.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills to work with both technical teams and business stakeholders.

  

  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**

Enterprise Software Engineer II
description:
At Medtronic you can begin a life\-long career of exploration and innovation, while helping champion healthcare access and equity for all. You’ll lead with purpose, breaking down barriers to innovation in a more connected, compassionate world.


**A Day in the Life**
=====================

As a Enterprise Software Engineer II, you will be working with motivated and diverse development teams to deliver world\-class products in Digital Technologies.
  

. Collaborate with Product Owners, Architects, and Leads to plan projects, estimate efforts, and deliver high\-quality solutions.
  

. Design, develop, and test cross\-platform applications using C\#, WPF, and React JS, ensuring reliability and maintainability.
  

. Actively participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies to drive iterative delivery and team alignment.
  

. Work with cross\-functional global teams to proactively resolve issues and ensure smooth project execution.
  

. Contribute to architectural discussions, implement scalable and secure solutions, and maintain compliance with IEC 62304 and ISO 13485\.
  

. Maintain, enhance, and modernize internal tools and applications while leveraging emerging .NET, React, and Web/Cloud technologies to drive innovation.
**Responsibilities may include the following and other duties may be assigned:**

* Design, develop, and test high\-integrity software using C\#.NET (WPF) and ReactJS as primary technologies.
* Maintain, enhance, and design new software tools and applications using C\#, WPF, ReactJS, Python scripting, and web technologies.

**Required knowledge and experience:**

* BE/ BTech/ME/MTech in Electronics/Instrumentation/Systems or relevant specialization in Engineering.
* 4 to 8 years of total experience.
* 4\+ years of **C\#.NET/WPF (XAML)** for Windows desktop apps (MVVM, REST APIs, debugging).
* 2\+ years of **React.js development** with component\-based architecture and responsive UI design.
* Strong knowledge of **Design Patterns** and **Architectural Patterns** applied in desktop \& web.
* Proficiency in **JavaScript (ES6\+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3** , and UI frameworks ( **Bootstrap** , responsive design).
* Hands\-on experience with **state management** (Redux, MobX, or Context API).
* Proven ability to integrate **React.js frontends with .NET backend services** (REST, WebSocket; DDS/device communication a plus).
* Familiarity with **modern build tools \& workflows** (Webpack, Babel, Vite, npm/yarn).
* Skilled with **Visual Studio, VS Code, Git\-based version control** .
  

**Nice to Have:**
* Domain knowledge of the **healthcare/medical device industry** .
* Experience with **cloud platforms** (Azure/AWS) and **CI/CD pipelines** (Azure DevOps, Jenkins, Bamboo).
* Exposure to **IoT and embedded systems programming** .
* Familiarity with **Six Sigma principles** and **regulatory\-driven development** .
* Knowledge of **layered architecture, MVC, and design best practices** .
* Proficiency with **SVN** and configuration management practices.
* Experience with **React testing frameworks** (Jest, React Testing Library, Mocha, Cypress).
* Familiarity with additional UI libraries ( **Material UI, Tailwind, Ant Design** ).

**Physical Job Requirements**  

  

The above statements are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed by employees assigned to this position, but they are not an exhaustive list of all the required responsibilities and skills of this position.


**Benefits \& Compensation**
============================

**Medtronic offers a competitive Salary and flexible Benefits Package**  

A commitment to our employees lives at the core of our values. We recognize their contributions. They share in the success they help to create. We offer a wide range of benefits, resources, and competitive compensation plans designed to support you at every career and life stage.  

  



This position is eligible for a short\-term incentive called the Medtronic Incentive Plan (MIP).
**About Medtronic**
===================

We lead global healthcare technology and boldly attack the most challenging health problems facing humanity by searching out and finding solutions.
  

Our Mission — to alleviate pain, restore health, and extend life — unites a global team of 95,000\+ passionate people.
  

We are engineers at heart— putting ambitious ideas to work to generate real solutions for real people. From the R\&D lab, to the factory floor, to the conference room, every one of us experiments, creates, builds, improves and solves. We have the talent, diverse perspectives, and guts to engineer the extraordinary.

**Autonomy:** Seasoned individual contributor. Works independently under limited supervision to determine and develop approach to solutions. Coaches and reviews the work of lower level specialists; may manage projects / processes.


**Organizational Impact:** May be responsible for entire projects or processes within job area. Contributes to the completion of work group objectives, through building relationships and consensus to reach agreements on assignments.


**Innovation and Complexity:** Problems and issues faced are difficult, and may require understanding of multiple issues, job areas or specialties. Makes improvements of processes, systems or products to enhance performance of the job area. Analysis provided is in\-depth in nature and often provides recommendations on process improvements.


**Communication and Influence:** Communicates with senior internal and external customers and vendors. Exchange information of facts, statuses, ideas and issues to achieve objective, and influence decision\-making.


**Leadership and Talent Management:** May provide guidance, coaching and training to other employees within job area. May manage projects, requiring delegation of work and review of others' work product.


**Required Knowledge and Experience:** Requires a Baccalaureate degree and minimum of 4 years of relevant experience OR Master's degree with a minimum of 2 years relevant experience OR PhD with 0 years relevant experience.


**Physical Job Requirements**  

  

The above statements are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed by employees assigned to this position, but they are not an exhaustive list of all the required responsibilities and skills of this position.

============================

**Medtronic offers a competitive Salary and flexible Benefits Package**  

A commitment to our employees lives at the core of our values. We recognize their contributions. They share in the success they help to create. We offer a wide range of benefits, resources, and competitive compensation plans designed to support you at every career and life stage.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
***Welcome to Warner Bros. Discovery… the stuff dreams are made of.***

**Who We Are…**

When we say, “the stuff dreams are made of,” we’re not just referring to the world of wizards, dragons and superheroes, or even to the wonders of Planet Earth. Behind WBD’s vast portfolio of iconic content and beloved brands, are the *storytellers* bringing our characters to life, the *creators* bringing them to your living rooms and the *dreamers* creating what’s next…


From brilliant creatives, to technology trailblazers, across the globe, WBD offers career defining opportunities, thoughtfully curated benefits, and the tools to explore and grow into your best selves. Here you are supported, here you are celebrated, here you can thrive.


Your New Role: The Sr Software Engineer reports to the Sr Manager, Engineering and is accountable for designing and delivering scalable, cloud\-native solutions that power our advertising technology stack. Your Role Accountabilities: Software Development \& Integration Build and maintain services for ad\-serving, campaign management, and identity systems. Full stack engineers possessing entire web development skills such as backend (JS, Python, java etc), frontend (HTML, JSS, framework like React/Angular/Vue), database (SQL, NoSQL), cloud platforms etc. Develop APIs and integrations with third\-party AdTech partners and data providers. Proficiency in: One language: Python, Java, JavaScript (Node.js), Go, Ruby, PHP, Angular/React framework, Cloud platform: AWS, Azure, GCP, DevOps tool Data Engineering Design and implement ETL pipelines and real\-time data processing for ad performance, forecasting, and yield optimization. Work with big data frameworks (Spark, Kafka) to handle large\-scale datasets Platform Modernization Contribute to migration of legacy systems to modular, cloud\-native architectures. Implement observability, security, and compliance best practices, system design. Collaboration \& Technical Guidance Partner with product and operations teams to align technical solutions with business goals. Share best practices and mentor junior engineers when needed. Qualifications \& Experience • Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field. • Engineering Expertise: 5\+ years in software engineering, with exposure to AdTech or large\-scale distributed systems. • Hands\-On technical experience: Hands\-on expertise with Java, Scala, or Python, JavaScript, Go. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure). Familiarity with big data tools (Spark, Kafka), data base systems (SQL, NoSQL) and streaming architectures. • AdTech Domain Knowledge: Familiarity with advertising workflows including forecasting, yield optimization, identity, and campaign execution. • Collaboration \& Mentorship: Demonstrated ability to partner with data scientists, product, and platform engineering, while mentoring junior engineers.**How We Get Things Done…**


This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at www.wbd.com/guiding\-principles/ along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.

**Championing Inclusion at WBD**


Warner Bros. Discovery embraces the opportunity to build a workforce that reflects a wide array of perspectives, backgrounds and experiences. Being an equal opportunity employer means that we take seriously our responsibility to consider qualified candidates on the basis of merit, regardless of sex, gender identity, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, religion or belief, marital status, pregnancy, parenthood, disability or any other category protected by law.
If you’re a qualified candidate with a disability and you require adjustments or accommodations during the job application and/or recruitment process, please visit our accessibility page for instructions to submit your request.

title: Software Developer
description:
Join ABC Fitness and become part of a culture that’s as ambitious as it is authentic. Let’s transform the future of fitness—together!


Our Values

**Best Life**


We believe great work begins with great people. That’s why our culture is built on respect, trust, and belonging. We create an inclusive environment where every team member can bring their authentic self to work—because diverse perspectives drive innovation and meaningful impact.

**Growth Mindset**


We are doers, thinkers, and dreamers. At ABC Fitness, your growth is our investment. Through continuous learning, mentorship, and professional development opportunities, we empower you to reach new heights—personally and professionally.

**One Team**


From day one, you’ll be part of a team that collaborates, celebrates, and cares. We move fast, support one another, and have fun along the way. Because when you thrive, we all thrive.


**WHAT YOU’LL DO:**

* General responsibility to design, develop, test and document software for current and new products for web based and front\-end applications, specifically:
* Work closely with a focused customer team to solve real problems, actively listening to customer needs and delivering impactful solutions
* Collaborate with the team of developers, QA Engineers \& design team to develop and ship new features
* Maintain code quality, organization, and automatization
* Be involved in a data\-driven decision\-making process—from understanding the "why" behind our work to learning from retrospectives that guide continuous improvement
* Collaborate with developers, product managers, designers and testers to transform ideas into unique, human experiences for fitness entrepreneurs

**WHAT YOU’LL NEED:**

* 1\+ years of experience with web based front\-end development\- Reactjs (highly preferred), Javascript, Angular
* Experience with front end (using *React*) \- mobile *web* development or *React* *Native* Development
* Our current technical stack is underpinned by *React*, *React* *native and* AWS
* *API* (Golang, *Java* and PHP)
* Understanding of *React* design principles
* Knowledge of modern Quality and Testing principles
* Comfortable learning new technologies and systems
* Familiar with Mobile oriented development practices
* Basic knowledge of code versioning tools – we have workflows in place so you don’t need to come in as an expert, just open to learning
* Strong written and verbal communication

**AND IT’S GREAT TO HAVE:**

* *React* *native* understanding
* Typescript
* Knowledge for tooling around continuous deployment
* Knowledge of design systems \& component library


**WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU:**

* Purpose led company with a Values focused culture – Best Life, One Team, Growth Mindset
* Time Off – competitive PTO plans with 15 Earned accrued leave, 12 days Sick leave, and 12 days Casual leave per year
* 11 Holidays plus 4 Days of Disconnect – once a quarter, we take a collective breather and enjoy a day off together around the globe. \#oneteam
* Group Mediclaim insurance coverage of INR 500,000 for employee \+ spouse, 2 kids, and parents or parent\-in\-laws, and including EAP counseling
* Life Insurance and Personal Accident Insurance
* Best Life Perk – we are committed to meeting you wherever you are in your fitness journey with a quarterly reimbursement
* Premium Calm App – enjoy tranquility with a Calm App subscription for you and up to 4 dependents over the age of 16
* Support for working women with financial aid towards crèche facility, ensuring a safe and nurturing environment for their little ones while they focus on their careers


At ABC Fitness, we don’t just build technology—we build communities and transform lives. Your work matters here, your growth is supported, and your voice is heard. We welcome diverse talent and encourage you to apply, even if you don’t meet every requirement.

**ABC’S COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY, EQUALITY, BELONGING AND INCLUSION**: ABC is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity, equity, and inclusion. We strive to create a workplace where every employee, client, and partner feels valued, inspired, and empowered to reach their full potential. For us, inclusion isn’t just the right thing to do—it’s a business imperative. Learn more at **abcfitness.com**.


About ABC Fitness


ABC Fitness is the \#1 software provider for fitness businesses of any size, all around the world. Supporting 30K clubs, 650K coaches, 40M members, and processing more than $12B in payments every year, ABC Fitness provides scalable, data\-driven solutions to simplify club management and engage members and clients.


From personal trainers, boutique studios, and gyms, to international franchise health clubs, ABC Fitness will move your business forward through technology and industry insights. Innovation is at the center of everything we do, across ABC Glofox, ABC Ignite, ABC Trainerize, and ABC Evo. Let's make your fitness vision a seamless reality, together. Learn more at **abcfitness.com**
