title: Product Analyst - 4 (MAM)
description:
### **ABOUT TIDE**



At Tide we help SMEs save time (and money) in the running of their businesses by not only offering business accounts and related banking services, but also a comprehensive set of highly usable and connected administrative solutions from invoicing to accounting.



Tide is transforming the small business banking market with over 1\.8 million members globally across the UK, India, Germany and France.



Using advanced technology, all solutions are designed with SMEs in mind. With quick onboarding, low fees and innovative features, we thrive on making data\-driven decisions to serve our mission: to help SMEs save both time (and money) so they can get back to doing what they love.


**Tide facts:**


* Tide is available for UK, Indian, German and French SMEs
* Over 1\.8 million members: 800,000 UK and 1,000,000 in India and growing rapidly
* Over $300 million raised in funding
* Over 2,500 Tideans globally \- we're diversity champions!
* We have offices in Central London, with a member support and technology centre in Sofia, Bulgaria, technology centres in Serbia, Romania, Lithuania and Hyderabad and offices in Gurugram and New Delhi, and in Berlin, Paris and Luxembourg.
**ABOUT THE TEAM:**
-------------------



The Member Accession Marketing team at Tide includes a Product team specialising in building and optimising Tide's member onboarding journeys, as well as owning additional products.  

  

**ABOUT THE ROLE:**


**Some of the things you'll be doing:**


* **Product Analysis \& Optimisation:** Conduct hypothesis\-driven deep dives into existing product data to identify user pain points, quantify the size of the problem, and propose actionable solutions.
* **Product Discovery \& Opportunity Sourcing: Lead hypothesis\-driven exploration, working with product and business teams to help uncover new product opportunities and validate them through data analysis.**
* **Product Experimentation:** Lead product experimentation efforts, helping design and analyse tests to build confidence in the features we invest in. You'll be the go\-to expert for product experiments, ensuring they provide meaningful data to guide decision\-making.
* **Product and Feature Performance Review:** Collaborate with product teams to establish and measure KPIs that reflect the impact of new features. Your analyses will ensure that product developments solve real user problems and drive increased adoption.
* **Goals to KPI Translations:** Work with product managers to translate conversion and revenue goals into business KPIs, identifying the impact hypotheses that will drive product success. You'll also collaborate with Analytics Engineers to enable seamless KPI reporting through intuitive dashboards.

  

  

**WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:**


* Have 5\+ years of experience in Product Analytics, preferably within digital or Fintech products
* Experience in onboarding and acquisition combined with experience in revenue optimisation would be highly preferable
* Strong SQL/Python proficiency
* Strong understanding of the product lifecycle, from ideation to execution and continuous iteration, including a strong hold on product experimentation
* Familiarity with key product metrics such as LTV, CAC, conversion rates, churn, and retention and ability to think critically about how onboarding and acquisition strategies contribute to overall business growth
* Experience capturing stakeholder requirements across various levels of seniority and functions and building appropriate analytical solutions
* Comfortable in leading and solving vague and ambiguous problems with minimal guidance
* Good communication and presentation skills and skilled in translating complex data analysis into insights presentable to business users
* You're a self\-starter and can operate with a high degree of independence
* You have a strong ownership mindset, you take initiative in spotting opportunities and finding ways to solve challenges with data; you don't wait for things to be told to you


You form relationships within the business in order to help with the adoption of data driven decision making

  

**WHAT YOU'LL GET IN RETURN**



Make work, work for you! We are embracing new ways of working and support flexible working arrangements. With our Working Out of Office (WOO) policy our colleagues can work remotely from home or anywhere in their home country. Additionally, you can work from a different country for up to 90 days a year. Plus, you'll get:


* 25 days paid annual leave
* 3 paid days off for volunteering or L\&D activities
* Extended maternity and paternity leave covered by the company
* Personal L\&D budget in the amount of 1000 BGN per year
* Additional health \& dental insurance
* Mental wellbeing platform
* Fully covered Multisports card
* Food vouchers
* Snacks, light food, drinks in the office
* WFH equipment allowance

  

  

**TIDEANS WAY OF WORKING**



At Tide, we're Member First and Data Driven, but above all, we're One Team. Our Working Out of Office (WOO) policy allows you to work from anywhere in the world for up to 90 days a year. We are remote first, but when you do want to meet new people, collaborate with your team or simply hang out with your colleagues, our offices are always available and equipped to the highest standard. We offer flexible working hours and trust our employees to do their work well, at times that suit them and their team.  

  

\#LI\-SW1

### **TIDE IS A PLACE FOR EVERYONE**



At Tide, we believe that we can only succeed if we let our differences enrich our culture. Our Tideans come from a variety of backgrounds and experience levels. We consider everyone irrespective of their ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, family or parental status, national origin, veteran, neurodiversity or differently\-abled status. We celebrate diversity in our workforce as a cornerstone of our success. Our commitment to a broad spectrum of ideas and backgrounds is what enables us to build products that resonate with our members' diverse needs and lives.



We are One Team and foster a transparent and inclusive environment, where everyone's voice is heard.

  


*At Tide, we thrive on diversity, embracing various backgrounds and experiences. We welcome all individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, or disability. Our inclusive culture is key to our success, helping us build products that meet our members' diverse needs. We are One Team, committed to transparency and ensuring everyone's voice is heard.*

  


**Disclaimer**

*It has come to our attention that individuals or agencies are falsely claiming to represent Tide and are reaching out to candidates regarding job opportunities. Please be aware that:*
* *Tide does* ***not*** *charge any fees at any stage of the recruitment process.*
* *All official Tide job opportunities are listed exclusively on our* ***Careers Page*** *and applications should be submitted through this channel.*
* *Communication from Tide will only come from an official* ***@tide******.co*** *email address.*
* *Tide does not work with agencies or recruiters without prior formal engagement, and we do not authorize third parties to make job offers on our behalf.*


*If you are contacted by anyone misrepresenting Tide or requesting payment, please treat it as fraudulent and report it to us immediately at* *talent@tide.co*  

*Your safety and trust are important to us, and we are committed to ensuring a fair and transparent recruitment process.*

  


*Tide leverages AI to enhance our hiring experience. You can read more about how we use AI in our recruitment process in our* *AI Policy**.*


*Your personal data will be processed by Tide for recruitment purposes and in accordance with* *Tide's Recruitment Privacy Notice**.*

title: Technical Product Analyst
description:
**Company Description**  

Experian is a global data and technology company, powering opportunities for people and businesses around the world. We help to redefine lending practices, uncover and prevent fraud, simplify healthcare, create marketing solutions, and gain deeper insights into the automotive market, all using our unique combination of data, analytics and software. We also assist millions of people to realize their financial goals and help them save time and money.


We operate across a range of markets, from financial services to healthcare, automotive, agribusiness, insurance, and many more industry segments.


We invest in people and new advanced technologies to unlock the power of data. As a FTSE 100 Index company listed on the London Stock Exchange (EXPN), we have a team of 22,500 people across 32 countries. Our corporate headquarters are in Dublin, Ireland. Learn more at experianplc.com.

 **Job Description**  

TenderLink is Experian's online marketplace for connecting businesses and opportunities across Australia and New Zealand. Buyers in governments and organisations use TenderLink to make sure they get the best value and relationships with their suppliers, and suppliers use TenderLink to make sure they find every relevant business opportunity. We have ambitious goals for what we can deliver for our customers and we're looking for a Product Analyst to join our APAC team and help shape the future of Experian TenderLink.

  

You'll be working with sales, product owners, designers and engineering to analyse and document customer product journeys, supporting high quality product feature development.

 **What you'll need to bring to the role \& Experian**

* 5\+ years' experience in business analysis, product analysis, user experience analysis or similar.
* Strong skillsets in analysis, questioning and documentation.
* Demonstrated experience communicating requirements to engineering teams, with high quality outcomes.
* Experience in requirements analysis for systems or integrations, such as API specifications or AI agent workflows
* Experience in an agile environment
* Proven collaboration with product managers, scrum masters and engineers.

 **Work that matters \- What you'll be doing**


You'll be designing the future TenderLink platform in partnership with the director of product, a product designer and a dedicated engineering team. This will involve:

* Requirements analysis – defining detailed functional and technical requirements from product designs and journeys
* Communication – helping engineering teams understand the context of requirements and facilitating communication with product owners.
* Knowledge management – setting and encouraging standards for effective documentation of knowledge, to support high quality outcomes.

 **More about you**

* Detail obsessed – you'll know our customer journeys in depth and what they are trying to achieve. You'll be highly effective at documenting requirements that help engineering teams deliver them.
* Pragmatic – you'll recognise that our work is a journey and not a destination and requirements can build over time.
* Passionate – you'll care deeply about the outcome; details matter to you.
* Collaborative – you know how to work effectively with a diverse team. You're purposeful with your communication and care about helping others be successful.
* Innovative – you're up to date with the latest techniques for rapid product analysis, including the use of AI tooling, and pride yourself on high velocity product iteration.

 **Why this role is important to us**


TenderLink is a substantial part of Experian's Australia and New Zealand business with a team distributed across APAC. The Product Analyst role will be a key role to facilitate effective collaboration for TenderLink, which is a key strategic priority for Experian.

 **Qualifications**  

* 3\-5\+ years' experience in business analysis, product analysis, user experience analysis or similar.

  

**Additional Information**  

Our uniqueness is that we celebrate yours. Experian's culture and people are important differentiators. We take our people agenda very seriously and focus on what matters; DEI, work/life balance, development, authenticity, collaboration, wellness, reward \& recognition, volunteering... the list goes on. Experian's people first approach is award\-winning; World's Best Workplaces™ 2024 (Fortune Top 25\), Great Place To Work™ in 24 countries, and Glassdoor Best Places to Work 2024 to name a few. Check out Experian Life on social or our Careers Site to understand why.


Experian is proud to be an Equal Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer. Innovation is an important part of Experian's DNA and practices, and our diverse workforce drives our success. Everyone can succeed at Experian and bring their whole self to work, irrespective of their gender, ethnicity, religion, colour, sexuality, physical ability or age. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know at the earliest opportunity.


Experian Careers \- Creating a better tomorrow together


Find out what its like to work for Experian by clicking here

title: Associate Specialist, Data Analyst
description:
Job Description

**The Opportunity**

* Based in Hyderabad, join a global healthcare biopharma company and be part of a 130\- year legacy of success backed by ethical integrity, forward momentum, and an inspiring mission to achieve new milestones in global healthcare.
* Be part of an organisation driven by digital technology and data\-backed approaches that support a diversified portfolio of prescription medicines, vaccines, and animal health products.
* Drive innovation and execution excellence. Be a part of a team with passion for using data, analytics, and insights to drive decision\-making, and which creates custom software, allowing us to tackle some of the world's greatest health threats.


Our Technology Centres focus on creating a space where teams can come together to deliver business solutions that save and improve lives. An integral part of our company’s IT operating model, Tech Centres are globally distributed locations where each IT division has employees to enable our digital transformation journey and drive business outcomes. These locations, in addition to the other sites, are essential to supporting our business and strategy.


A focused group of leaders in each Tech Centre helps to ensure we can manage and improve each location, from investing in growth, success, and well\-being of our people, to making sure colleagues from each IT division feel a sense of belonging to managing critical emergencies. And together, we must leverage the strength of our team to collaborate globally to optimize connections and share best practices across the Tech Centres.

**Role Overview**


We are looking for a motivated Junior Business \& Data Analyst to support the design and development of data products within the IT Data Domain. You will work closely with senior analysts, Product Owners, and Data Engineers to analyze IT data sources, document requirements, and help define transformation logic that engineers implement using DBT and modern data platforms.


This is a great opportunity for an early\-career analyst who enjoys working with data, learning new technologies, and contributing to meaningful data solutions that support IT Service Management, IT Operations, and related processes. Your work will help improve the quality, usability, and value of our data products, while giving you exposure to domain experts and modern data engineering practices.

**What will you do in this role**

**Data Product Support \& Requirements**

* Assist in defining data product requirements, including data elements, business definitions, and user needs.
* Help gather, document, and refine user stories for data product enhancements or new features.
* Contribute to mapping source data from ITSM, IT Operations, monitoring tools, or CMDB systems into logical data structures.

**Data Analysis \& Transformation Logic**

* Analyze source datasets to understand data availability, quality, and relationships.
* Document transformation logic—joins, filters, and basic derivations—that will be implemented by data pipeline engineers.
* Use SQL to explore data, validate assumptions, and support prototype creation.

**Collaboration With Senior Team Members**

* Work under guidance of senior analysts to develop data models, transformation rules, and documentation.
* Partner with data engineers to clarify requirements and ensure transformations are correctly understood before implementation.
* Support testing activities by validating that outputs meet requirements and expected logic.

**Stakeholder Engagement \& Communication**

* Participate in requirement\-gathering meetings, workshops, and refinement sessions.
* Communicate findings clearly, ask clarifying questions, and help prepare documentation for technical and business audiences.
* Practice active listening and bring thoughtful questions to challenge assumptions and improve solutions.

**Learning, Growth \& Contribution**

* Learn about IT Service Management, IT Operations, system monitoring, and their data structures.
* Develop skills in SQL, data modeling, data product lifecycle, and data domain governance.
* Grow into a trusted analytical partner by taking ownership of smaller features and contributing to data product improvements.

**What should you have :**


Education \& Experience

* Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, Data Analytics, or a related field.
* 1–3 years of experience in analytics, reporting, data analysis, or similar internship/entry\-level role.
* Experience working with databases, writing SQL queries, or preparing data for reporting is a plus.


Technical Skills

* Basic SQL skills and willingness to grow into more advanced querying and data transformation.
* Familiarity with BI tools (Power BI, Spotfire, or similar) is beneficial.
* Understanding of data concepts like tables, joins, schemas, and data quality principles.

**Behavioral Competencies**

* Curious, proactive learner eager to grow into data product and data domain expertise.
* Strong attention to detail and problem\-solving mindset.
* Good communication skills with the ability to ask thoughtful questions and explain data findings.
* Openness to feedback, ability to listen actively, and willingness to challenge assumptions constructively.
* Comfortable working in a collaborative, cross\-functional environment.


Our technology teams operate as business partners, proposing ideas and innovative solutions that enable new organizational capabilities. We collaborate internationally to deliver services and solutions that help everyone be more productive and enable innovation.

**Who we are**


We are known as Merck \& Co., Inc., Rahway, New Jersey, USA in the United States and Canada and MSD everywhere else. For more than a century, we have been inventing for lives, bringing forward medicines and vaccines for many of the world's most challenging diseases. Today, our company continues to be at the forefront of research to deliver innovative health solutions and advance the prevention and treatment of diseases that threaten people and animals around the world.

**What we look for**


Imagine getting up in the morning for a job as important as helping to save and improve lives around the world. Here, you have that opportunity. You can put your empathy, creativity, digital mastery, or scientific genius to work in collaboration with a diverse group of colleagues who pursue and bring hope to countless people who are battling some of the most challenging diseases of our time. Our team is constantly evolving, so if you are among the intellectually curious, join us—and start making your impact today.

title: Business Analyst II, RBS : Cost To Serve
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Are you passionate about solving business challenges at a global scale? We are looking for an experienced Business Analyst to join our team and help unlock insights that will drive global cost reductions for Amazon. The candidate will be excited about understanding Amazon's operational processes and implementing AI\-powered solutions to identify cost improvement opportunities. They will do this by partnering with key stakeholders across business, operations, Finance and cross\-geography teams. They should be curious and comfortable digging deep into the business challenges to understand and identify insights that will enable us to expands our capabilities globally to scale this initiative. They will be comfortable delivering/presenting these recommended solutions by retrieving and integrating artifacts in a format that is immediately useful to improve the business decision\-making process. This role requires an individual with excellent analytical abilities as well as business acumen. They are experts in partnering and earning trust with operations/finance leaders to drive these key business decisions.  

  

Responsibilities:  

  

  

  

* Own the development of analytical solutions that help identify cost anomalies at scale. Create summarized visuals and insights out of the analytical models.

  

* Partner with operations/finance teams to consult, develop and implement KPI’s, build large size databases to track these KPIs globally and finally automate the reporting solutions.

  

* Enable effective decision making by retrieving and aggregating data from multiple sources and compiling it into a digestible and actionable format.

  

* Prepare and deliver business requirements reviews to the senior management team regarding progress and roadblocks.

  

* Design, develop and maintain scaled, automated, user\-friendly systems, reports, dashboards, etc. that will support our business needs.

  

* Excellent writing skills, to create artifacts easily digestible by business and tech partners.

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Creation, maintenance of Dashboards
* Build Infrastructure to grow into a Tier 1 product
* Own all partnerships with stakeholders to setup, onboard and maintain required tables, data lakes, data structures for APIE
* Developing, maintaining queries for APIE features and owning ad\-hoc query needs/dive deeps for escalations/issues identified

* Act as the custodian of data for APIE and maintain sanity of data across all APIE stakeholders
* Present insights from time to time to that will help shape effective feature expansion strategies WW

  

About the team  

Cost to Serve (CTS) aims to identify and eliminate waste, negative experiences, and non\-value activities across the end\-to\-end remit of supply chain and dependent workstreams that slow down resolution for our stakeholders. The primary objective is to reduce Cost To Serve for Amazon and enable “Free Cash Flow” by optimizing the Cost per shipped unit economics across the supply chain systems. Our program will support in establishing the end\-to\-end supply chain checkpoints on how the inventory moves inside Amazon to identify gaps, broken processes/policies to eliminate root causes of systemic difficulties rather than merely addressing symptoms, on behalf of our customers. This team will partner with internal/external stakeholders to establish the FCF/Cost to serve charter based on opportunity size and own specific unique initiatives that are beyond the existing team’s program scope.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**

* 3\+ years of Excel (including VBA, pivot tables, array functions, power pivots, etc.) and data visualization tools such as Tableau experience

* Experience defining requirements and using data and metrics to draw business insights
* Experience making business recommendations and influencing stakeholders
* Experience with Excel

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Master's degree in business or analytical discipline

* **People Management Functional Career Stream:** Management and supervisory professionals with one or more employees who are focused on tactical, operational and some strategic activities within a specified area. Levels within the management career stream typically have six or more direct reports. Most of the time is spent overseeing their area of responsibility, managing performance, developing talent, engagement and inclusion, communicating business and operational developments, planning, prioritizing and / or directing the responsibilities of direct reports. Goal achievement is typically accomplished through performance of direct and / or indirect reports. A key responsibility of roles in this career stream is managing people. which includes accountability for mentoring, developing and coaching staff on meeting/exceeding performance expectations and defined objectives, providing leadership to staff ensuring the prioritization of strategic and department level initiatives to include defining performance goals and targets, conducting performance reviews, and staff 1:1s to guide performance management and employee development efforts and managing toward departmental goals.
* **Differentiating Factors** :
* **Autonomy:** Manages subordinate supervisors and/or experienced professionals who exercise latitude and independence in assignments.
* Provides tactical and / or operational leadership and coaching.
  

Receives assignments in task and objective oriented terms.
* **Organizational Impact:** Establishes operational plans and implements policies and strategies.
  

Decisions impact program schedules, customer satisfaction levels, or allocation of time, material resources, expenditures and funds.
  

May have budget or P\&L accountability for a department, function or geography.
  

Strive for continuous improvement and consistency in deliverables.
* **Innovation and Complexity:** Proposes modifications to functional operating policies and day\-to\-day processes.
  

Problems and issues faced are complex, difficult and undefined, and require detailed information gathering, analysis and investigation to understand the problem.
* **Communication and Influence:** Communicates with internal and external customers and vendors regarding ongoing operations.
  

Uses information exchange, influence and active persuasion without direct exercise of command to gain cooperation of other parties.
  

May interact on issues that have externally shared objectives.
* **Leadership and Talent Management:** Manages a team consisting of supervisors and / or experienced professionals in the Specialist career stream.
  

Leads, directs and reviews the work of a team who exercises latitude and independence in their assignments.
  

Authorizes hiring, firing, promotion and reward within own area.

**Required Knowledge and Experience:**

* Requires practical knowledge in leading and managing the execution of processes, projects and tactics within one job area.
* Typically, there is advanced knowledge and skills within a specific technical or professional discipline with understanding of the impact of work on other areas of the organization.
* Requires a Baccalaureate degree (or for degrees earned outside of the United States, a degree which satisfies the requirements of 8 C.F.R. § 214\.2(h)( 4\)(iii)(A) and minimum of 5 years relevant experience, or advanced degree with a minimum of 3 years prior relevant experience.

**Physical Job Requirements**  

  

The above statements are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed by employees assigned to this position, but they are not an exhaustive list of all the required responsibilities and skills of this position.

============================

**Medtronic offers a competitive Salary and flexible Benefits Package**  

A commitment to our employees lives at the core of our values. We recognize their contributions. They share in the success they help to create. We offer a wide range of benefits, resources, and competitive compensation plans designed to support you at every career and life stage.  

  



This position is eligible for a short\-term incentive called the Medtronic Incentive Plan (MIP).
**About Medtronic**

We lead global healthcare technology and boldly attack the most challenging health problems facing humanity by searching out and finding solutions.
  

Our Mission — to alleviate pain, restore health, and extend life — unites a global team of 95,000\+ passionate people.

If you're passionate about enabling leadership, influencing product and business strategy, and fostering a thriving culture—this is your opportunity to lead from the center.

description:

The Cloud \& AI organization accelerates Microsoft’s mission and bold ambitions to ensure that our company and industry is securing digital technology platforms, devices, and clouds in our customers’ heterogeneous environments, as well as ensuring the security of our own internal estate. Our culture is centered on embracing a growth mindset, a theme of inspiring excellence, and encouraging teams and leaders to bring their best each day. Microsoft Security aspires to make the world a safer place for all. We want to reshape security and empower every user, customer, and developer with a secure cloud that protects them with end\-to\-end, simplified solutions. The Microsoft Security organization accelerates Microsoft’s mission and bold ambitions to ensure that our company and industry is securing digital technology platforms, devices, and clouds in our customers’ heterogeneous environments, as well as ensuring the security of our own internal estate. Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. title: Cloud Solution Architecture
description:
**Overview**  

As part of Microsoft Customer Experience \& Success (CE\&S) with over 17000 employees worldwide, the International Customer Success Organization (iCSU) mission is to incubate, deliver and scale world\-class customer success services for Microsoft’s most strategic, innovative, complex, and globally operating customers.


Join our expanding and culturally diverse iCSU team as Cloud Solution Architect (CSA) for AI and help us build a future where customers come to us not only because we provide industry\-leading AI products and services, but also because we provide a differentiated and connected customer experience.


The CSA is a customer\-facing role, and you will own technical relationship between the customer and Microsoft for the most innovative analytics projects, helping customers to leverage their Microsoft investments through platform thinking, architecture design across technologies, hands\-on development of PoCs, implementation support, and solution optimization engagements. AI and Microsoft Fabric has flipped our lives upside down in the last year – and you will join our passionate, collaborative, and innovative team of experienced Data \& AI CSAs in India who are looking forward to welcoming you in the fast\-paced and dynamic Era of AI. Our customers are longing for your support to help them get their data ready for AI!

  

This role is flexible in that you can work up to 100% from home.


Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

 **Responsibilities** **Customer Centricity**

* Understand customers’ enterprise data estate business and IT priorities and measures of success to design data \& analytics solutions that drive business value.
* Be an integral part as technical expert in enterprise account teams and help orchestrate customer outcomes across roles. Act as technical project manager across technologies and projects where needed to benefit from synergies between customer teams, partners, and Microsoft teams.
* Strive for high customer satisfaction \& become a trusted advisor for development teams, technical as well as business decision makers.
* Ensure that customer solutions exhibit high levels of performance, security, scalability, maintainability, repeatability, appropriate reusability, and reliability upon deployment.
* Be the Voice of Customer to share insights and best practices, connect with Engineering team to remove key blockers and drive product improvements.

**Business Impact**

* Apply technical knowledge and architecture frameworks to design solutions that meet business and IT needs, create data \& analytics roadmaps, drive hands\-on POCs and MVPs, and ensure long term technical viability of new deployments, infusing key AI technologies where appropriate.
* Cloud and customer success business growth – Help customers get the best possible value from their cloud and customer success investments. Intentionally seek opportunities for clouds business expansion and help scope, and shape new customer success contracts.
* Resolution of customer blockers \- identify resolutions to customer blockers by leveraging intellectual property (IP), Microsoft recommended practices, subject matter expertise, and your network.

**Technical Leadership**

* Accelerate customer outcomes – lead outcome\-focused customer engagements and workshops, using and extending managed intellectual property (IP). Share expertise in technical communities and contribute to improvement of managed IP.
* Governance and change management – drive enterprise\-grade platform architectures, help establish data governance processes and advise customers on change management and adoption.
* Learn it all mindset \-Maintain and extend technical skills and knowledge, keeping up to date with market trends and competitive insights; collaborate and share with the data \& analytics technical communities while educating and keeping customers up to date on Azure products.
* Customer/ partner and market insights – leverage market insights and aggregated customer experience to accelerate customer success and share feedback from customer engagements

  

**Qualifications** **Required/Minimum Qualifications**

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, or related field AND 10\+ years experience in cloud/infrastructure technologies, information technology (IT) consulting/support, systems administration, network operations, software development/support, technology solutions, practice development, architecture, and/or consulting
	+ OR equivalent experience.
* 3\+ years experience building enterprise\-grade, cloud\-based analytical solutions leveraging evolving data architectures (data warehousing, data lakes, lake houses, streaming architectures and BI) as well as the underlying frameworks and data formats.
* Languages: Business fluency in English.

**Additional/Preferred Qualifications**

* Technical
* + 7\+ years experience building enterprise\-grade, cloud\-based analytical solutions leveraging evolving data architectures. Experience defining data governance strategies as well as supporting adoption and change of data cultures.
	+ 3\+ years experience building enterprise\-grade, cloud\-based analytical solutions with Microsoft products (Microsoft Fabric, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Databricks, Azure Data Explorer, Azure Data Factory, Azure Data Lake, Power BI). 1 year experience building Generative AI solutions. building production\-grade, AI, and machine learning solutions (applied AI products and custom machine learning models) and knowledge to apply well\-adopted machine learning and AI frameworks.

  

* + Breadth of technical experience in cloud solutions and knowledge in foundational security, infrastructure and network design, and foundational AI.
	+ Expertise in Oracle database products and migration as well as refactoring to Azure/AWS/GCP (native) solutions with PostgreSQL and Oracle IaaS.
		- OR deep domain expertise in operational databases and large\-scale cloud migrations.
* + Experience creating hands\-on data \& analytics Proof of Concepts (PoC), Minimum Viable Products (MVPs) for customers that lead to production deployments.
	+ Competitive Landscape: Knowledge of key data \& analytics platforms such as AWS, GCP, Snowflake, data bricks etc.
	+ Hands\-on experience with software development and data operations practices and the most common tools.
* Business Value: The ability to convey the business need and value of proposed solutions, plans, and risks to stakeholders and decision makers. This includes the ability to persuade and inform based on facts and alignment with goals and strategy.
* Trusted Advisership: The ability to build trusted advisor status and deep relationships across stakeholders (e.g., technical decision makers, business decision makers) through an understanding of customer needs and technologies.
* + Situational fluency: Using self\-awareness as a mechanism to interpret verbal and non\-verbal cues to increase your ability to "read the room."
	+ Insightful listening: asking insightful questions to understand the customer needs, issues, business environment and drivers, and going beyond what customer has said.
* Languages: knowledge of either Polish, French, Arabic, or Hebrew is a plus.

title: Principal Software Engineering Manager
description:
**Overview**  

Are you an experienced Group Engineering Manager with a passion for solving hard problems, dealing with ambiguity and driving the business forward? Do you excel in collaborating with architects, product management, and data disciplines to create clarity on ambiguous problems? Do you thrive on solving complex and ambiguous challenges? Are you able to generate energy for the teams that you lead? If so, come join us!  

  

We are the Microsoft Store team, a part of the Windows \+ Devices (W\+D) organization in Microsoft. Our team’s vision is that Windows users find it easy to discover and engage with the experiences they need most; and for developers and ISVs to be excited to build Windows apps and games because they can innovate, differentiate, and exceed their business goals on Windows. You will lead a growing team that builds high scale, secure, reliable, low latency services that power an experience that runs on hundreds of millions of devices, alongside a portfolio of high scale services that we build today. If you have experience in Agentic AI and Model Context Protocol (MCP), that's a plus! Past experience with Apple Appstore, Google Play store, STEAM and working with developers will be a great plus!  

  

Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.  



  

  

**Responsibilities**  


You will be a highly technical and experienced cloud services GEM who determines the right strategy and roadmap to grow the developer ecosystem on Windows and Microsoft Store! You will work closely with Engineering managers and ICs to build services to support Store developer experiences leveraging MCP and Agentic AI. You will be a strong people manager who is committed to creating clarity, generating energy, and delivering success. As a people manager, you will deliver success through empowerment and accountability by modeling, coaching, and caring. You will provide direction to the team through breaking down service specs and architecture, and work across multiple disciplines to make implementation decisions. In your role you will work with peers across Product management and software engineering to launch new experiences that integrate with existing systems. We welcome your innovative ideas and fresh perspectives to strengthen our growth mindset culture that is grounded in customer obsession, and diversity and inclusion.  

**Qualifications** **Required Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or related technical field AND 6\+ years technical engineering experience with coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C\+\+, C\#, Java, JavaScript, or Python
	+ - OR equivalent experience.

* Exceptional teamwork and values that foster a positive team culture.
* Experience in collaborating with teams across different time zones and geographies.
* Experience driving strategy, roadmap and business vision across product groups and business units.
* Experience in leading and coaching teams of Engineering managers providing expert guidance, hands\-on assistance, best practices, and training.
* Strong and applied knowledge of service infrastructure, frameworks, and technologies such as Azure Cloud Services, Azure Service Fabric, ASP.NET Core 2, .Net Framework, NuGet packages, and Git.
* Knowledge of common services design patterns and application development best practices.
* Demonstrated ability to ramp up on both new and legacy technologies.
* Proven ability to work through the full DevOps lifecycle from initial design to final product to live site support.
* Proven fundamental understanding of how to deliver end\-to\-end scenarios with security, reliability, and engineering quality in mind.
* Ability to learn and work effectively in a highly ambiguous, rapidly evolving environment.

 **Preferred Qualifications:**

* Overall 15\+ years of experience working on large scale services, with atleast 7\+ years in people leadership role.
* Past experience working with App Stores, developers, submitting apps to Apple AppStore, Google Playstore, STEAM will be great to have.
* Experience of engaging deeply with developers and customers and the community to influence technical decision\-making.
* Proficiency in Agentic AI and Model Context Protocol (MCP) and accelerate Product development.

* Knowledge of specific technologies such as Azure Cloud Services, Azure Service Fabric, ASP.NET Core 2, .Net Framework, NuGet packages, Git, Service Bus, Event Hub, Data Factory, Tables/Queues/Blobs, SQL, Key Vault, Application Insights nice to have.

The ideal candidate will blend creativity with data\-driven decision\-making to drive brand visibility, engagement, and qualified lead generation while aligning marketing efforts with overall business growth objectives.*#### ***Content \& Brand Strategy***

* *Own and execute the overall content and growth strategy across all digital platforms to drive brand awareness, engagement, and qualified leads.*
* *Define and maintain brand tone, voice, and visual direction, ensuring consistency across digital and offline touchpoints.*
* *Plan, execute, and optimize monthly content calendars across platforms including Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, Pinterest, Reddit, and emerging channels.*
* *Develop high\-quality blog content aligned with SEO strategy and brand positioning.*
* *Manage and update website content via WordPress, ensuring SEO best practices, performance optimization, and content consistency.*

#### ***Creative Direction \& Production***

* *Conceptualize and lead photoshoots, testimonial shoots, and video productions including shot planning, scripting, and post\-production direction.*
* *Provide clear direction on platform\-specific video formats and content types based on audience behavior and performance insights.*
* *Plan and launch monthly video\-led campaigns focused on lead generation, brand trust, and conversions.*
* *Oversee the creation and quality control of marketing collaterals including social media creatives, banners, brochures, catalogs, presentations, and on\-ground branding materials.*
* *Possess strong understanding of graphic design principles and print branding (brochures, flyers, hoardings, catalogs, etc.) to collaborate with designers effectively.*

#### ***Performance Marketing \& Growth***

* *Plan, execute, and optimize Meta Ads (Facebook \& Instagram) campaigns with expertise in audience targeting, creative testing, funnel building, and CPL optimization.*
* *Plan, execute, and scale Google Ads campaigns including Search, Display, and YouTube with a performance\-first approach.*
* *Analyze campaign performance, lead quality, CAC, and ROI; continuously optimize based on insights and data.*
* *Develop and implement A/B testing strategies across creatives, landing pages, and campaigns.*

#### ***Market Intelligence \& Business Impact***

* *Conduct competitive analysis to benchmark brand positioning, content strategy, and ad performance against industry peers.*
* *Track market trends, platform algorithm updates, and emerging content formats to maintain competitive advantage.*
* *Contribute to business forecasting by analyzing marketing data, lead trends, seasonal performance, and campaign outcomes.*
* *Collaborate closely with sales, design, and execution teams to ensure campaigns align with revenue targets and business goals.*

* *Proven experience in growth marketing, content strategy, and performance advertising.*
* *Strong working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads.*
* *Experience managing and publishing content on WordPress.*
* *Understanding of SEO fundamentals and blog content optimization.*
* *Strong analytical mindset with ability to translate data into actionable strategies.*
* *Knowledge of branding, graphic design principles, and print production.*
* *Excellent communication, project management, and cross\-functional coordination skills.*
 ***Educational Qualifications:***

* *3\-4 Years of proven digital marketing experience, specifically in driving successful SEO campaigns.*
* *Previous involvement in interior design or related industries is advantageous.*

### **Benefits**

* *Medical benefits to ensure healthy troopers. We are with you in your tough times.*
* *A weekend for work\-life balance. You work only 5 days a week.*
* *Provident fund* *for your long term goals* *and Health Insurance.*
* *Blow your steam off with a Vacation\-Off, 12 days a year, we want you to "Eat, Pray and Love" a bit.*
* *Also, Did we mention a fun work environment?*

  

Master's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field.

title: Audit, Risk & Control Governance, VP
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

**Job Title:** **Audit, Risk \& Control Governance, VP**

**Location:** **Pune, India**

**Corporate Title: VP**

**Role Description**

The Vice President – Audit, Risk \& Control Governance plays a critical leadership role in strengthening the control environment, managing audit and regulatory commitments, and ensuring operational risk excellence across the CIO portfolio.


**What we’ll offer you**

As part of our flexible scheme, here are just some of the benefits that you’ll enjoy


* Best in class leave policy
* Gender neutral parental leaves
* 100% reimbursement under childcare assistance benefit (gender neutral)
* Sponsorship for Industry relevant certifications and education
* Employee Assistance Program for you and your family members
* Comprehensive Hospitalization Insurance for you and your dependents
* Accident and Term life Insurance
* Complementary Health screening for 35 yrs. and above

**Your key responsibilities**

**Audit Management \& Findings Governance**

* Serve as senior member of the Embedded Risk Team (ERT) for full lifecycle management of Internal Audit findings, Regulatory findings, and Self‑Identified Issues.
* Oversee status reviews, remediation documentation, and evidence validation.
* Drive high‑quality closure packs aligned to DB’s documentation framework.
* Engage senior stakeholders and Risk Type Controllers for escalation and oversight.
* Guide finding owners on GFMS mapping, Risk Acceptance processes, Target Date Extension and Risk Acceptance renewals.
* Collaborate with Ernst \& Young and support IT Application Owner (ITAO) with evidence preparation.
* Lead governance forums including ERT, Audit Review Forum, Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Monthly Risk \& Control discussion, and internal meetings.
* Monitor and drive remediation of high‑risk ratings and control weaknesses.
* Support improvements in open due and overdue control items, e.g.JAVA patching compliance, SDLC automation, vulnerability remediation.

**Sarbanes‑Oxley Act (SOX) Support**

* Contribute to BIS SOX governance by reviewing application‑level items and partnering with ITAOs.
* Coordinate with Technical Information Security Officer (TISO), Information Security Risk Assessor (ISRA), and governance partners on SOX‑related remediation.

**Risk \& Control (R\&C) Management**

* Lead Control Workbench (CWB) dashboarding and overdue item governance.
* Partner with IT Application Owners on risk remediation.
* Oversee software asset reviews, impairment governance, and approval workflows.
* Act as Business Continuity Coordinator, managing BCM documentation, lifecycle activities, and compliance.

**CIO Office \& Leadership Support**

* Provide strategic and operational support to CIO leadership.
* Lead or contribute to cross‑functional initiatives within the CIO remit.

**People \& Administrative Responsibilities**

* Oversee onboarding, buddy program governance, and new‑joiner communication.
* Support early‑career hiring processes including interns and apprentices.
* Govern people‑related processes such as transfers and job‑family alignment.
* Prepare materials for Workers’ Council reviews.
* Manage First Aid and safety responsibilities, e.g. fire assistance.
* Coordinate IT equipment and facilities requests.
* Oversee procurement of office supplies and administrative needs.
* Own dbList governance and access recertification for structured/unstructured data.
* Share operational updates and support End User Services processes.

**Your skills and experience**

This VP role is essential to maintaining a resilient and well‑controlled technology environment. It strengthens audit readiness, enhances governance infrastructure, improves risk transparency, and supports CIO leadership in managing complex technology operations.


**How we’ll support you**

* Training and development to help you excel in your career
* Coaching and support from experts in your team
* A culture of continuous learning to aid progression
* A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit your needs

**About us and our teams**

Please visit our company website for further information:


**https://www.db.com/company/company.html**

We strive for a culture in which we are empowered to excel together every day. This includes acting responsibly, thinking commercially, taking initiative and working collaboratively.


Together we share and celebrate the successes of our people. Together we are Deutsche Bank Group.


We welcome applications from all people and promote a positive, fair and inclusive work environment.

**Job Reference \#**


333258BR
**City**


Pune
**Your role**


Are you a stickler for getting things right? Do you know how to solve problems? We are looking for someone like this who can help us work on some interesting projects,
  

  

The role is within RAS India which provides management reporting and analytical services to global internal partners. Main team focus is on Group Reporting, Group Treasury, Investment Bank Reporting, Cost Reporting, Service Management and automation through a Joint Venture with the IT team.
  

  

The Project work will initially entail but will not be limited to Shadowing a senior lead as a mentee to understand Day to Day Business requirements and work expectations within the assigned sub division. This will enable the candidate to get a more practical view of the industry and the skills required to excel. Working on specific work assignments which will broadly fall in the remit of creation and publication of Reports along with Analytical inputs. Analyzing and assisting in automation of existing work stack with usage of advanced data visualization tools. This task will have both consultative as well as execution based aspects. Ideal candidate will have a flair of working with large data sets. Capability to mine information and interpret the same. Excellent logical reasoning. The candidate should have an aspiration of working in Analytics and Data Visualization and Reporting stream post completion of the Degree Programme.
**Your team**


The candidate will be assigned to Group Region and Country (“RnC”) Reporting team which provides high quality end to end reporting services to our clients.
  

* The team prepares periodic financial statements and other financial reports / interactive dashboards focusing on Regional and country level financial performance as per stakeholder requirement.
* Your role will be to support the reporting process and any related ad hoc activities
* Additionally you will called upon to support the team in developing solutions to automate processes and build report visualization dashboards using latest reporting tools.

**Your expertise**


You have:  

– strong analytical and numerical skills combined with a flair of visualization  

– ability to focus on details and quality  

– working knowledge of Power BI, MS Excel, VBA skills will be an added advantage  

– understanding of accounting principles desired  

– have passed CA Intermediate exam and are looking for Industrial trainee with a global firm.  

  

You are:  

– a problem solver able to scope/prioritize along guidelines and willing to take ownership  

– a team player and strong communicator with interpersonal skills
  

– flexible and resilient with a positive attitude towards change
**About us**


UBS is a leading and truly global wealth manager and the leading universal bank in Switzerland. We also provide diversified asset management solutions and focused investment banking capabilities. Headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland, UBS is present in more than 50 markets around the globe.  

We know that great work is never done alone. That’s why we place collaboration at the heart of everything we do. Because together, we’re more than ourselves. Want to find out more? Visit ubs.com/careers.
**Join us**


At UBS, we know that it's our people, with their diverse skills, experiences and backgrounds, who drive our ongoing success. We’re dedicated to our craft and passionate about putting our people first, with new challenges, a supportive team, opportunities to grow and flexible working options when possible. Our inclusive culture brings out the best in our employees, wherever they are on their career journey. And we use artificial intelligence (AI) to work smarter and more efficiently. We also recognize that great work is never done alone. That’s why collaboration is at the heart of everything we do. Because together, we’re more than ourselves.  

We’re committed to disability inclusion and if you need reasonable accommodation/adjustments throughout our recruitment process, you can always contact us.

UBS Recruiting

UBS is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We respect and seek to empower each individual and support the diverse cultures, perspectives, skills and experiences within our workforce.

title: CRM Senior Test Engineer
description:
Join us as a CRM Senior Test Engineer at Barclays where you will spearhead the evolution of our test automation infrastructure and deployment pipelines, driving innovation and operational excellence. You will harness cutting\-edge technology to build and manage robust, scalable and secure test automation frameworks, ensuring seamless delivery of our Salesforce\-powered digital solutions.


To be successful as a CRM Senior Test Engineer, you should have experience with:

* Salesforce testing expertise across Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, and Experience Cloud with deep understanding of Salesforce configuration, customization, data models, security models, workflows, process automation, and API integrations.
* Hands\-on test automation experience with Provar (Salesforce automation), Playwright (JavaScript/TypeScript), and Selenium WebDriver (Java) including expertise in building scalable automation frameworks using Page Object Model, Hybrid, and Data\-Driven patterns.
* Strong programming and framework proficiency in Java, JavaScript, TestNG, JUnit, Cucumber (BDD), Maven/Gradle, Git version control, and comprehensive API testing using REST Assured, Postman, or similar tools with proven ability to design and implement CI/CD pipelines.
* Proven leadership in agile testing methodologies with expertise in test strategy development, regression/functional/integration/end\-to\-end testing, test data management, JIRA/X\-Ray test management, DevOps tools (Jenkins, Azure DevOps, GitLab), and ability to mentor teams while collaborating with cross\-functional stakeholders.


Some other highly valued skills may include:

* Advanced DevOps and CI/CD expertise including pipeline integration, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), infrastructure\-as\-code, BrowserStack/cloud testing integration, and zero\-configuration deployment strategies.
* ETL testing and database proficiency with Unix shell scripting, advanced SQL for data validation, Ab Initio knowledge, and experience with performance testing tools (JMeter, LoadRunner, Gatling).
* AI/ML\-driven testing innovation including implementation of intelligent test generation, self\-healing tests, test optimization algorithms, codeless automation platforms, and shift\-left testing practices.
* Proactive innovation mindset with track record of introducing new testing technologies, driving quality transformation initiatives, bringing creative solutions to complex problems, and demonstrating strong business acumen in banking/financial services domain.


You may be assessed on key critical skills relevant for success in role, such as risk and controls, change and transformation, business acumen, strategic thinking and digital and technology, as well as job\-specific technical skills.


The role is based out of Pune.


**Purpose of the role**


To design, develop, and execute testing strategies to validate functionality, performance, and user experience, while collaborating with cross\-functional teams to identify and resolve defects, and continuously improve testing processes and methodologies, to ensure software quality and reliability.

**Accountabilities**

* Development and implementation of comprehensive test plans and strategies to validate software functionality and ensure compliance with established quality standards.
* Creation and execution automated test scripts, leveraging testing frameworks and tools to facilitate early detection of defects and quality issues. .
* Collaboration with cross\-functional teams to analyse requirements, participate in design discussions, and contribute to the development of acceptance criteria, ensuring a thorough understanding of the software being tested.
* Root cause analysis for identified defects, working closely with developers to provide detailed information and support defect resolution.
* Collaboration with peers, participate in code reviews, and promote a culture of code quality and knowledge sharing.
* Stay informed of industry technology trends and innovations, and actively contribute to the organization's technology communities to foster a culture of technical excellence and growth.

**Assistant Vice President Expectations**

* To advise and influence decision making, contribute to policy development and take responsibility for operational effectiveness. Collaborate closely with other functions/ business divisions.
* Lead a team performing complex tasks, using well developed professional knowledge and skills to deliver on work that impacts the whole business function. Set objectives and coach employees in pursuit of those objectives, appraisal of performance relative to objectives and determination of reward outcomes
* If the position has leadership responsibilities, People Leaders are expected to demonstrate a clear set of leadership behaviours to create an environment for colleagues to thrive and deliver to a consistently excellent standard. The four LEAD behaviours are: L – Listen and be authentic, E – Energise and inspire, A – Align across the enterprise, D – Develop others.
* OR for an individual contributor, they will lead collaborative assignments and guide team members through structured assignments, identify the need for the inclusion of other areas of specialisation to complete assignments. They will identify new directions for assignments and/ or projects, identifying a combination of cross functional methodologies or practices to meet required outcomes.
* Consult on complex issues; providing advice to People Leaders to support the resolution of escalated issues.

title: Data Analyst
description:
Join us as a Data Analyst at Barclays where you will be working towards ensuring that the implementation of several Corporate Bank initiatives aligned with \& adhere to the Corporate Data Strategy. This role will support stakeholders in understanding the nuances of the data strategy while working with business \& technical SMEs to clarify the scope \& impacts of the initiatives. Applying a business domain lens to the requirements of each initiative is key.


To be successful as a Data Analyst , you should have experience with:

* Data Analysis using SQL.
* Data Lakehouse / Warehouse Concepts.
* Payments Data Domain Knowledge (SWIFT and ISO 20022\).
* Data Modelling Concepts.


 Some other highly valued skills may include:

* Data analysis using Python .
* Any Lakehouse technology like Snowflake, Databricks etc.
* Awareness of standard project control tools, including JIRA, Confluence, etc.
* Unix \& ETL Concepts .
* RDBMS Database concepts.


You may be assessed on key critical skills relevant for success in role, such as risk and controls, change and transformation, business acumen, strategic thinking and digital and technology, as well as job\-specific technical skills.


The role is based out of Pune.


**Purpose of the role**


To enable data\-driven strategic and operational decision making through extracting actionable insights from large datasets, performing statistical and advanced analytics to uncover trends and patterns, and presenting findings through clear visualisations and reports.

**Accountabilities**

* Investigation and analysis of data issues related to quality, lineage, controls, and authoritative source identification, documenting data sources, methodologies, and quality findings with recommendations for improvement.
* Designing and building data pipelines to automate data movement and processing.
* Apply advanced analytical techniques to large datasets to uncover trends and correlations, develop validated logical data models, and translate insights into actionable business recommendations that drive operational and process improvements, leveraging machine learning/AI.
* Through data\-driven analysis, translate analytical findings into actionable business recommendations, identifying opportunities for operational and process improvements.
* Design and create interactive dashboards and visual reports using applicable tools and automate reporting processes for regular and ad\-hoc stakeholder needs.

**Analyst Expectations**

* To perform prescribed activities in a timely manner and to a high standard consistently driving continuous improvement.
* Requires in\-depth technical knowledge and experience in their assigned area of expertise
* Thorough understanding of the underlying principles and concepts within the area of expertise
* They lead and supervise a team, guiding and supporting professional development, allocating work requirements and coordinating team resources.
* If the position has leadership responsibilities, People Leaders are expected to demonstrate a clear set of leadership behaviours to create an environment for colleagues to thrive and deliver to a consistently excellent standard. The four LEAD behaviours are: L – Listen and be authentic, E – Energise and inspire, A – Align across the enterprise, D – Develop others.
* OR for an individual contributor, they develop technical expertise in work area, acting as an advisor where appropriate.
* Will have an impact on the work of related teams within the area.
* Partner with other functions and business areas.
* Takes responsibility for end results of a team’s operational processing and activities.
* Escalate breaches of policies / procedure appropriately.
* Take responsibility for embedding new policies/ procedures adopted due to risk mitigation.
* Advise and influence decision making within own area of expertise.
* Take ownership for managing risk and strengthening controls in relation to the work you own or contribute to. Deliver your work and areas of responsibility in line with relevant rules, regulation and codes of conduct.
* Maintain and continually build an understanding of how own sub\-function integrates with function, alongside knowledge of the organisations products, services and processes within the function.
* Demonstrate understanding of how areas coordinate and contribute to the achievement of the objectives of the organisation sub\-function.
* Make evaluative judgements based on the analysis of factual information, paying attention to detail.
* Resolve problems by identifying and selecting solutions through the application of acquired technical experience and will be guided by precedents.
* Guide and persuade team members and communicate complex / sensitive information.
* Act as contact point for stakeholders outside of the immediate function, while building a network of contacts outside team and external to the organisation.


All colleagues will be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Values of Respect, Integrity, Service, Excellence and Stewardship – our moral compass, helping us do what we believe is right. They will also be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Mindset – to Empower, Challenge and Drive – the operating manual for how we behave.

title: Sterling Integrator / Senior Consultant Specialist
description:
Some careers shine brighter than others.


If you’re looking for a career that will help you stand out, join HSBC and fulfil your potential. Whether you want a career that could take you to the top, or simply take you in an exciting new direction, HSBC offers opportunities, support and rewards that will take you further.


HSBC is one of the largest banking and financial services organisations in the world, with operations in 64 countries and territories. We aim to be where the growth is, enabling businesses to thrive and economies to prosper, and, ultimately, helping people to fulfil their hopes and realise their ambitions.


We are currently seeking an experienced professional to join our team in the role of Senior Consultant Specialist.


In this role, you will:

* At a team level, playing a consultative role to help put in place the appropriate people, process, and tools and coaching members of the team as needed to optimize the efficiency of the support team
* Participate in estimation using the guidelines
* Execute support specific development activities in accordance to applicable standards and quality parameters.
* Mentor new joiners in the project support and assign tasks to junior support developers
* Work with Team Leads / Solution architect to understand the delivery
* Work on test automation of Sterling Integrator developments
* Ensure strict adherence to all regulatory issues and compliance to internal controls.
* Should deliver considering the operational risk associated with the role and manage operational risk


To be successful in this role, you should meet the following requirements:

* 8 \-12 years of IT experience in managed file transfer (MFT with SFTP, FTPS, C:D, AS2, SOAP ) Sterling Integrator solutions/applications/tools including Business Processes development
* Alerting and monitoring tools like AppDynamics, splunk, etc.
* Should have worked in DevOps team and well versed with Agile Framework. DevOps tools like Git, Jenkins, etc.
* Operating system – Unix/Linux
* Database \- Oracle
* Agile – Scrum framework
* Experience of successful execution of product upgrades and evergreening projects.
* MI reporting with different tools.


The successful candidate will also meet the following requirements:

* Data analysis tools like power BI
* Experience of Machine Learning technologies
* Data lake technologies and data patterns
* Jenkins / automation / shell scripting

  

You’ll achieve more when you join HSBC.


www.hsbc.com/careers


HSBC is committed to building a culture where all employees are valued, respected and opinions count. We take pride in providing a workplace that fosters continuous professional development, flexible working and opportunities to grow within an inclusive and diverse environment. Personal data held by the Bank relating to employment applications will be used in accordance with our Privacy Statement, which is available on our website.

Our team of dedicated engineers, partner ecosystem and industry veterans are on a mission to redefine how you design and visualize.  

### **Job Description**


**Admin Executive**

 **About the Role:**

  

We are looking for a proactive and detail\-oriented **Admin Executive** with 2–3 years of experience to manage daily office operations, vendor coordination, compliance support, travel arrangements, and employee services. The ideal candidate should have strong communication, time management, and problem‑solving skills.

 **Key Responsibilities:**

 **Office \& Facility Management**

  

* Manage office supplies inventory and place orders as needed.
* Maintain office premises, ensure smooth functioning, and arrange necessary repairs.
* Handle property management and coordinate with building/facility management teams.
* Manage security, housekeeping, and overall office upkeep.
* Address employee queries related to office administration and facilities.
* Manage tenant\-related complaints at the Rainbow Plaza office.
 **Vendor \& Compliance Management**

  

* Organize and schedule meetings and appointments with vendors.
* Handle vendor management and negotiate services as required.
* Manage facility\-related vendors such as cleaning, catering, and security.
* Support SEZ compliances, government and non\-government statutory compliances.
* Manage renewals and realignments of Group \& Parent insurance policies.
* Manage renewal of liabilities insurance.
 **Employee Lifecycle Support**

  

* Assist with the onboarding process for new employees.
* Support the exit process, including coordination of formalities.
* Plan and execute employee engagement activities.
* Manage attendance tracking and reconciliation.
 **Events \& Travel Management**

  

* Support planning of corporate events and festival celebrations.
* Manage domestic and international travel arrangements, including VISA processing, flights, hotels, forex, etc.
* Coordinate meetings, client visits, and related arrangements.
 **Finance \& Operational Support**

  

* Handle petty cash, reimbursements, and mobile recharge management.
* Ensure timely and accurate documentation for facility and vendor operations.
### **Requirements**

  

* Proven experience as an Office Administrator, Office Assistant, or related administrative role.
* Strong understanding of office management procedures, operations, and systems.
* Proficiency in MS Office, especially MS Excel and MS Outlook.
* Excellent time management with the ability to multitask and prioritize effectively.
* Strong attention to detail and problem‑solving abilities.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Ability to maintain professionalism and confidentiality.

title: Specialist Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Specialist Machine Learning Engineer**


We are the most trusted provider of data collection and management, marketing program management, and analytical solutions for our Crop and Animal Health industry clients.


With data services at the core—surrounded by an extensible array of streamlined software solutions—our unified platform represents over three decades of innovation and expertise in the agriculture, crop protection, specialty chemical and animal health industries.


Backed by an entrepreneurial, creative and energetic work force, teammates at AGDATA are pushing the boundaries of technology to enhance our relationships with our clients.


We are a growing team, focused on adding creative, knowledgeable individuals who are ready to jump right in and make an immediate impact.

* 30\+ years of experience in the Crop and Animal Health industry
* More than**20 billion USD** sales are processed annually
* Over**2,15,000 payments** issued via marketing programs yearly


Visit us on www.agdata.com


More about us here: https://vimeo.com/347063684

**What’s** **the role?**


If you are looking for an opportunity to solve deep technical problems, build innovative solutions, and work with top\-notch developers, AGDATA has the role for you.


You must be able to look at the big picture from both business and technology perspective, possess strong analytical, design, and problem\-solving skills.


You are not afraid of ambiguity, dealing with nebulous requirements, and get excited about difficult challenges.

**In this role, you will have the opportunity to…*** Designs and develops scalable solutions and models. Performs research and testing to develop algorithms and predictive models.
* Identifies trends, patterns, and anomalies found in big data sets by performing extensive data analysis to develop insights.
* Performs data mining, cleaning, and aggregation processes to prepare data, implement data models, conduct analysis, and develop databases.
* Develop processes to store model outputs in an SQL database and ensure seamless integration with reporting systems.
* Interprets results from multiple structured and unstructured data sources using programming, statistical, and analytical techniques and tools.
* Collaborates with teams to understand each data analysis projects 'purpose, focus, and objectives.
* Designs, develops, and implements valuable data\-driven solutions for the organization. Integrates, tests, tunes, and monitors solutions. Proficient in big data tools, cloud platforms, multiple AI tools such as Python, Java, or R.
* Mentors and train engineers on the AI/ML tools.
* Builds processes for AI/ML projects
* Participates in POCs \& tool selection
* Proficient with collaborating on code base in Git/ADO.
* Typically requires a master's degree in computer science, mathematics, engineering or equivalent.

**Technical Skills for a Data Scientist*** **8\+ Years of experience in Data Science.**
* **AI \& Machine Learning Tools: Large** Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG), Scikit\-Learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, H2O.
* **Programming Languages:** Python, R, Julia, SQL.
* **Data Tools:** Pandas, dplyr, ggplot2,Tidyverse, datatable.
* **Cloud \& DevOps:** AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform, Pulumi, CloudFormation.
* **Databases:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, NoSQL.
* **Other Skills:** API Development, Data Cleaning \& Transformation, Neural Networks, NLP, Computer Vision, Predictive Modeling, IoT, Blockchain, Quantum Computing.

**How AGDATA will support you:****Supporting your health \& well\-being:*** Comprehensive medical coverage – up to INR 7\.5 lakh for employee and dependents, including parents.
* OPD benefit– coverage of up to INR 15thousandcovering expenses across specialties.
* Paternity leaves up to 14 working days with the option to split leave.

**Emphasizing work life balance:** Flexible hybrid work policy

**Experiencing a work culture that promotes from within:** In 2023, 13% of our associates were promoted internally.

**Being comfortable in the office:** Coming into our brand\-new office space? Free snacks and top\-class facilities will be available for you.


We seek out and reward people who are adaptable, accountable, collaborative and curious. We want our teammates to reflect the diversity of the communities in which we operate. We welcome people as they are, creating an inclusive culture where all forms of diversity are seen as a real value for the company. We’re looking for people with a passion for success and who are looking to GROW!

 *AGDATA is proud to offer equal employment opportunities. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation at any time during the recruitment process, please let us know.*

title: AI Engineer (Backend & ML Systems)
description:
**AI Engineer (Backend \& ML Systems)**

**Job Title:** Applied AI Engineer  
**Location:** Pune, Maharashtra  
**Experience:** 2–4 Years  
**Employment Type:** Full\-Time  
**Company:** Qodequay Technologies Pvt. Ltd.

**About Qodequay Technologies Pvt. Ltd.**

Qodequay Technologies Pvt. Ltd. is a design thinking\-led IT services company specializing in Web, Mobile, Cloud, AI, AR/VR, and emerging technologies. We focus on building scalable, intelligent, and innovative digital solutions that solve real\-world business challenges.

**Job Summary**

We are looking for an Applied AI Engineer with strong expertise in backend development and machine learning systems. The candidate will be responsible for designing and deploying AI\-powered applications, LLM\-based solutions, and scalable ML pipelines. The role requires hands\-on experience in AI system architecture, API development, and production\-grade AI deployments.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Plan, prioritize, and assign work to ensure timely delivery of milestones.

What we are looking for:* Education: BE/B.Tech/ME/M.Tech/MCA in Engineering, Computer Science, or related fields
