title: Senior Software Development Engineer, Kindle E-Reader
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Amazon Kindle is a revolutionary reading device and one of the most innovative devices at Amazon.
  

Our Organization is looking for an inventive and technically skilled Software Development Engineer to join our diverse team at the forefront of delighting millions of readers around the world. We build the next generation reading experience. Our team works backwards from customers by understanding their needs to design and implement solutions that deliver an immersive reading experience across a wide variety of devices, genres, and formats.  

  

We are looking for full\-stack Software Development Engineers who enjoys building high quality software that touches millions of customers. Those who seek a challenge, are eager to learn, and want to make a impact on global customers should apply.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

As a Senior Software Development Engineer, you will own adding capabilities as we unlock more features on Kindle E\-reader family. Our goal is to make it fast, easy and low\-cost for our internal application developers to build features and release them on our E\-reader stack.  

You will tackle challenging, novel situations every day and given the size of this initiative, you’ll have the opportunity to work with multiple technical teams across Amazon.  

We will need to tackle problems that span a variety of domains: software, hardware, networks and distributed systems as well as automation.  

You design and develop the critical components in E\-reader that make the product a performant, secure and power optimized device.  

Along the way you’ll learn a ton, have fun and make a positive impact on millions of people.  

* You are an expert in C/C\+\+ as well as comfortable working in client and service side stack.
* Collaborate with experienced Amazonians to design, and bring innovative components in E\-reader
* Architect and design a secure software that protects customer data stored on the devices.
* Identify what it means to keep the software stack up\-to\-date keeping an eye on advancements both in hardware as well as software.

  

A day in the life  

  

In this role, you will be actively engaged in developing our E\-reader software that are based on C/C\+\+. You will be contacted by many Amazonian as they deploy their software on E\-reader. You will also be the lead engineer for your team in guiding them both on design and best practices.  

  

Ship and review C\+\+, ReactNative or Java for reading features on Kindle E\-Reader, Kindle Apps on iOS/Android.
  

Collaborate with peers, product owners, UX designers and partner tech teams on architecture and design of reading features.
  

Adapt the customer experience for the next generation of Kindle E\-Reader devices focusing on operational excellence, monitoring the team's code deployment pipelines and dashboards
  

Root cause issues and propose solutions  

Train new team members on how E\-Reader and Kindle Application software is constructed, how it operates, how secure it is, and how it fits into the bigger picture.  

  

About the team  

We own the design, architecture, and implementation of a surface to enable reading innovation across file formats and operating systems. Our software supports Kindle customers on all major mobile surfaces and Kindle devices. Our engineers enjoy working as a team and welcome the opportunity to lead whenever possible.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 5\+ years of non\-internship professional software development experience
* 5\+ years of programming with at least one software programming language experience
* 5\+ years of leading design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
* Experience as a mentor, tech lead or leading an engineering team

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 5\+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience
* Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent

description:

Full time

No
**Job Description:**

**The opportunity:**

To leverage strong writing, editing, illustrating and technical skills to develop high‑quality documentation that supports product usability and organizational goals.


**How you'll make an impact:**

* Preparation of Installation and Maintenance Manuals. Troubleshooting guides, Operational Manuals, Technical Data sheet and other relevant Engineering documents.
* Creation of standard isometric illustration using the relevant tools.
* Preparation of Digital Solution documents for the end customer.
* Migration of legacy documents into Component Content Management tool (optional).
* Revise the document based on the feedback from the stakeholders and customers.
* Ensure the deliverables for completeness, compliance with standards, consistency before sending to stakeholders for review.
* You will be responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines.
* Living Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.

**Your background:**

* You hold a degree in BE/BTech (ECE/EEE/Mechanical or any relevant).
* Minimum 8 to12 years of experience in Technical Writing (in domains such as such as Power and Energy/ OEM, IT, Manufacturing, Aerospace).
* Knowledge on the processes: DDLC, Agile Methodology, knowledge on standards:S1000D, IEC, UL are required.
* Require knowledge on BOM and Engineering drawing.
* Excellent diligence, problem solving and analytical skills.
* Should possess knowledge on the following tools: MS office Suite, Acrobat Professional, Snagit, SAP VEA / Creo Illustrate/JTgo/NX/PLM, any vector graphic Tool (preferably Adobe Illustrator), any relevant Component Content Management Tool.
* Should possess ownership on the deliverable and track to closure on\-time, adaptable to the circumstances and passion to do self\-learning.
* Should possess excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.

title: Senior Visual Designer
description:
**Job Description**

**\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-**

Senior Visual Designer

Lead ideas, shape strategy, and turn creativity into growth.

Chennai, India \| Creative \& Strategy \| 4 \- 6 years \| On\-site \|

Role Overview

We’re looking for a Senior Visual Designer who can both design hands\-on and lead the graphic

design function at EyeLevel. This role goes beyond execution. You’ll set visual direction, raise

design standards, mentor designers, and ensure every output from the team is sharp, consistent,

and performance\-driven. You’ll work closely with the founder, creative lead, copywriters, and

growth team shaping how brands look, feel, and perform across touchpoints.

This role is for you if you:

● Enjoy designing and guiding others to do their best work

● Think in systems, not just screens or posts

● Care about design quality, speed, and impact equally

● Are confident taking ownership of visual decisions and direction

What you’ll do:

● Lead the visual design function at EyeLevel across client and internal brands

● Own and define the visual look and feel for assigned accounts across web, social, ads,

and campaigns

● Design high\-impact visuals yourself—websites, landing pages, social creatives, and ad

assets

● Review, guide, and elevate the work of junior and mid\-level designers

● Set clear visual standards, processes, and quality benchmarks for the design team

● Build and maintain scalable design systems, brand kits, and reusable components

● Collaborate with the founder and creative lead on brand strategy and creative direction

● Translate campaign strategy, hooks, and offers into strong visual narratives

● Ensure performance\-focused thinking in design decisions (CTR, engagement,

conversions)

● Prepare clean, developer\-ready Figma files and ensure smooth handoffs

● Iterate based on feedback, performance data, and A/B testing insights

● Ensure consistency, polish, and clarity across everything the design team delivers

Must\-have skills \& experience:

● 4–6\+ years of experience as a Visual / UI / Graphic Designer in an agency, startup, or

product environment

● Prior experience mentoring, leading, or reviewing other designers’ work

● A strong portfolio showcasing:

● Website and landing page UI (Figma)

● Social media and performance ad creatives

● Brand identities or cohesive visual systems

● Advanced proficiency in Figma (components, auto\-layout, systems, responsive design)

● Strong command of Photoshop and Illustrator (or equivalents)

● Excellent eye for typography, layout, color, and hierarchy

● Ability to convert strategy and briefs into clear visual direction for a team

● Strong communication skills—able to give and receive constructive feedback

Nice to have:

● Experience in education, real estate, sports, or lifestyle/D2C brands

● Working knowledge of motion design for reels, ads, and simple animations

● Familiarity with performance marketing concepts and metrics

● Experience collaborating closely with developers or Webflow/Framer/WordPress teams

Mindset \& culture fit:

● You take ownership and think like a creative partner, not just a designer

● You care about growing people, not just delivering files

● You’re comfortable with fast feedback loops and evolving briefs

● You’re curious about how design decisions affect business outcomes

Job Types: Full\-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹200,000\.00 \- ₹800,000\.00 per year

Application Question(s):

* How many years of overall experience do you currently have?
* Are you ready to visit the office for face to face round of interview ?
* What is your Expected CTC in LPA? ?(max 8\)
* What is your notice period in days? (max 30\)

Experience:

* Visual Design?: 4 years (Required)
* Figma: 4 years (Required)
* Adobe Photoshop: 4 years (Required)
* Adobe Illustrator: 4 years (Required)
* Graphic Design: 4 years (Preferred)
* UI: 4 years (Required)

Work Location: In person

title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor
description:
**Job Title:** Graphic Designer cum Video Editor  
**Organization:** Alshifa Cupping Clinic  
**Location:** Chennai / Coimbatore / Vellore (Hybrid/On\-site options available)  
**Salary Range:** ₹40,000 – ₹50,000 per month (based on experience)  
**Experience Required:** 1–2 years minimum  
**Joining:** Immediate

**About Alshifa Cupping Clinic**

Alshifa Cupping Clinic is a trusted name in holistic wellness, specializing in Hijama therapy and integrative skin care. We are expanding our digital presence to inspire and educate our community through engaging visual storytelling across online platforms.

**Job Overview**

We are looking for a creative and versatile **Graphic Designer cum Video Editor** to join our marketing team. You will be responsible for designing and producing high\-quality visual content for our website, social media, campaigns, and promotional materials. From concept to execution, you’ll help shape our brand’s visual identity and digital engagement through compelling graphics and video content.

**Key Responsibilities**

* **Design \& Visual Content Creation:**
* Create engaging graphics for social media (Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, WhatsApp), website, emailers, and print collaterals.
* Design branding materials, brochures, banners, posters, and clinic displays.
* Develop visual themes for campaigns, festivals, and health awareness drives.
* **Video Production \& Editing:**
* Plan, shoot, and edit professional videos including treatment explainers, patient testimonials, doctor interviews, and behind\-the\-scenes content.
* Handle end\-to\-end video production – scripting, shooting, sound, lighting, and post\-production editing.
* Create short\-form videos (Reels, YouTube Shorts) optimized for digital platforms.
* **Digital Platform Management:**
* Assist in managing and updating website visuals and blog graphics.
* Maintain brand consistency across all online and offline touchpoints.
* Collaborate with the content team to visualize health tips, therapy benefits, and promotional content.
* **Creative Ideation \& Strategy:**
* Brainstorm and propose fresh, innovative ideas for visual storytelling.
* Stay updated with design trends, editing tools, and social media best practices.
* Adapt content based on performance analytics and audience engagement.

**Qualifications \& Skills**

* 1–2 years of proven experience in graphic design and video editing.
* Proficiency in **Adobe Creative Suite** (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects) or similar tools.
* Hands\-on experience with video shooting, lighting, and sound equipment.
* Strong portfolio showcasing graphics and video work (social media content, promotional videos, branding projects).
* Knowledge of digital marketing platforms and content optimization for social media.
* Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and handle multiple projects.
* Creative mindset with an eye for detail and aesthetics.
* Basic understanding of the wellness/healthcare industry is a plus.

**What We Offer**

* Competitive salary between **₹30,000 – ₹40000** per month based on skill and experience.
* Opportunity to build and grow the visual identity of a reputed wellness brand.
* Creative freedom and a collaborative work environment.
* Regular training and exposure to integrated marketing projects.
* Potential for performance\-based incentives.

Job Type: Full\-time

Pay: ₹30,000\.00 \- ₹50,000\.00 per month

Work Location: In person

title: Senior 2D Designer
description:
We’re looking for a Senior 2D Designer to join our creative team – someone who can bring ideas to life across print, digital, and spatial formats for corporate events and brand experiences.

Key Responsibilities

Conceptualize and design 2D visual assets for corporate events, including but not limited to:

Event branding (logos, themes, look \& feel)

Stage and set designs (2D renders)

Signage and wayfinding

Backdrops, banners, and event collaterals

Event presentations and pitch decks

Collaborate with event producers, 3D designers, content writers, and client servicing teams to develop cohesive visual concepts.

Translate brand guidelines into innovative design for event environments.

Create print\-ready artwork and liaise with production teams to ensure high\-quality output.

Work on quick\-turnaround designs for event pitches and last\-minute requests.

Maintain consistency of visual branding across all touchpoints.

Mentor junior designers and provide creative direction when needed.

Stay updated on trends in design, branding, and event experiences.

Required Skills \& Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field.

5\+ years of experience in 2D design, with a strong portfolio in events, advertising, or brand communication.

Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign); knowledge of After Effects or other animation tools is a plus.

Strong understanding of spatial design and how 2D works within a 3D environment.

Ability to interpret briefs, think conceptually, and deliver under tight timelines.

Knowledge of print production, materials, and processes relevant to event design.

Excellent communication and presentation skills.

Detail\-oriented with strong time and project management skills.

Preferred

Prior experience working with event agencies or experiential marketing firms.

Familiarity with corporate branding standards and B2B event formats.

Knowledge of basic 3D software (SketchUp, Cinema 4D, etc.) is a bonus.

Proficiency in Design Software – Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, CorelDRAW (for print materials), and After Effects/Premiere Pro (for video editing).

title: UX Designer II, RBS Brand Experience (BX)
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN), a Fortune 500 company based in Seattle, opened on the World Wide Web in July 1995 and today offers Earth's Biggest Selection. Amazon.com, Inc. seeks to be Earth's most customer\-centric company, where customers can find and discover anything they might want to buy online, and endeavors to offer its customers the lowest possible prices. Today, we operate retail websites in nine countries, offering millions of products in more than 40 categories worldwide, and we still like to work hard, have fun and make history!  

  

About the Team:  

RBS Brand Experience (BX) enables worldwide brands (FBA Sellers and Retail Vendors) with strategic, actionable insights and recommendations through brands\-facing solutions, self\-help tools, and updated policies to empower them to take a customer backwards approach that drives business growth while reducing the Cost to Serve for both Amazon and Brands. We do this by: 1\) identifying and validating underserved Brand pain points, 2\) building proof of concept, solution and capabilities in partnership with Brands, 3\) scaling the solution by leveraging tech, 4\) launching full scale brand facing solutions to WW brands, and 5\) continuously improve solutions through control mechanisms (such as; monitoring impact, user base, adoption, GTM).  

  

Job Overview:  

Amazon's Brand Experience (BX) team is seeking an exceptional Senior UX Designer to transform complex brand challenges into intuitive, scalable solutions that drive seller and vendor success. In this role, you will lead user research initiatives, conduct discovery workshops, and translate insights into compelling design solutions. You will collaborate closely with product management and engineering to design wireframes, user flows, and high\-quality UX solutions. You will influence the product roadmap and ensure our services are highly usable for both builders and non\-technical customers, while revamping existing product experiences to create richer, more engaging interactions for users.  

  

Key Responsibilities:
  

* Lead comprehensive user research initiatives including user interviews, usability testing, and competitive analysis to inform design decisions and validate solutions
* Plan and facilitate customer discovery sessions, workshops, and feedback loops to deeply understand user needs, pain points, and behaviors
* Synthesize research findings into actionable insights that drive product strategy and design direction
* Lead the end\-to\-end delivery of simplified solutions for the best outcome, present a variety of those solutions, and represent the benefits and challenges with each approach
* Handle complex problems/efforts, decisions, and escalations as well as determine where to simplify or extend solutions for the best outcome
* Mitigate long\-term risks, balance short\- vs. long\-term needs, and operate effectively at both strategic and tactical levels
* Lead org reviews and critiques, and craft/present key narratives (e.g., 6\-pagers, business reviews, PR/FAQs, OP1/OP2 inputs) to leadership and cross\-functional teams to drive focus and outcomes
* Influence product and engineering decisions by bringing the customer perspective, guiding design choices, and driving long\-term impact
* Set the standard for design excellence while driving clarity in ambiguous initiatives where problems, strategies, requirements, or technical feasibility are undefined
* Advise partner teams and senior leaders on org goals and design strategy, influencing engineering decisions to enable UX solutions and driving outcomes across teams and geographies

  

Basic qualifications  

* 5 to 7 years of experience as a user experience designer, interaction designer, information architect, or similar role
* An online portfolio or samples of work demonstrating experience creating great user\-centered design solutions is a requirement for application
* Communication and collaboration skills with proven experience partnering with developers to implement designs.
* Demonstrated ability to thrive in fast\-paced, ambiguous environments by multitasking, driving design reviews to closure, and collaborating effectively across organizational boundaries.
* Fluency in best practices for web\-based information architecture and design, as well as knowledge of usability principles and techniques
* Proficient in web design considerations, with a background in design/HCI (or equivalent experience) and expertise in tools like Photoshop, Illustrator, Fireworks, and Visio.
* Skilled in creating interactive prototypes with design aesthetics and a focus on simplicity over complexity.

  

  

  

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 7\+ years of user experience designer, interaction designer, information architect, or similar design\-related role experience
* Experience working in a collaborative team and working directly with developers for implementation of designs
* Experience working with fast\-moving, high\-performance teams and driving innovative solutions tailored to unique business environments

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience with a variety of design tools such as Photoshop, Illustrator, Fireworks, Visio, Axure, and Dreamweaver
* Experience in visual design expertise with ability to produce fresh, simple, elegant and exceedingly usable layouts and interactions and iconography

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
